src: List the light conditions for accidents where the number of casualties is greater than two, specifically for those light conditions that appear more than once in the records.
mt: రెండు కంటే ఎక్కువ సంఖ్యలో ప్రాణనష్టాలు ఉన్న ప్రమాదాల కోసం కాంతి పరిస్థితులను జాబితా చేయండి, ప్రత్యేకంగా రికార్డులలో ఒకటి కంటే ఎక్కువ సార్లు కనిపించే కాంతి పరిస్థితుల కోసం.

src: List the distinct light conditions for accidents where the number of casualties is greater than two and the day of the week is not Sunday, ordered alphabetically by the light conditions.
mt: ఆపాతాల కోసం విభిన్న కాంతి పరిస్థితులను జాబితా చేయండి, ఇక్కడ ప్రాణనష్టాల సంఖ్య రెండు కంటే ఎక్కువ మరియు వారం యొక్క రోజు ఆదివారం కాదు, కాంతి పరిస్థితుల ద్వారా అక్షర క్రమానికి ఆదేశించబడింది.

src: Show the light conditions, the weather conditions, and the total number of casualties, grouped by both light and weather conditions, and ordered from the highest to the lowest sum of casualties.
mt: కాంతి పరిస్థితులు, వాతావరణ పరిస్థితులు మరియు మొత్తం ప్రాణనష్టాల సంఖ్యను చూపించండి, కాంతి మరియు వాతావరణ పరిస్థితుల ద్వారా సమూహీకరించి, ప్రాణనష్టాల మొత్తం నుండి అత్యధికం నుండి అత్యల్పం వరకు ఆదేశించండి.

src: List the light conditions and weather conditions along with the total number of casualties for each combination, grouped by light and weather conditions and ordered by the total casualties in descending order.
mt: ప్రకాశ పరిస్థితులు మరియు వాతావరణ పరిస్థితులను ప్రతి సమ్మేళనం కోసం మొత్తం ప్రాణనష్టాల సంఖ్య కలిసి జాబితా చేయండి, ప్రకాశ మరియు వాతావరణ పరిస్థితుల ద్వారా సమూహీకరించి మరియు మొత్తం ప్రాణనష్టాల ద్వారా అవరోహణ క్రమంలో ఆదేశించండి.

src: List the light conditions and weather conditions for all environmental settings where the total number of casualties exceeds 2, and display these results in descending order based on the total sum of casualties.
mt: మొత్తం ప్రాణనష్టం 2 కంటే ఎక్కువ ఉన్న అన్ని పరిసర సెట్టింగ్‌ల కోసం కాంతి పరిస్థితులు మరియు వాతావరణ పరిస్థితులను జాబితా చేయండి, మరియు ఈ ఫలితాలను మొత్తం ప్రాణనష్టం మొత్తం ఆధారంగా అవరోహణ క్రమంలో ప్రదర్శించండి.

src: List the light conditions and weather conditions along with the total number of casualties for each combination, where the total casualties exceed 2, and order the results from the highest number of casualties to the lowest.
mt: ప్రతి కలయికకు కాశ్మీర్ సంఖ్య 2 కంటే ఎక్కువ ఉన్న చోట, కాశ్మీర్ సంఖ్య ఎక్కువ నుండి తక్కువకు క్రమం చేసి, కాశ్మీర్ సంఖ్య కలిసి ప్రకాశ పరిస్థితులు మరియు వాతావరణ పరిస్థితులను జాబితా చేయండి.

src: List the distinct light conditions and weather conditions recorded for all accidents, and sort the results by the light conditions.
mt: అన్ని ప్రమాదాల కోసం నమోదు చేయిన విభిన్న కాంతి పరిస్థితులు మరియు వాతావరణ పరిస్థితులను జాబితా చేయండి, మరియు ఫలితాలను కాంతి పరిస్థితుల ద్వారా క్రమబద్ధీకరించండి.

src: List the distinct light conditions and weather conditions recorded for accidents, ordered alphabetically by the light conditions.
mt: ప్రమాదాల కోసం రికార్డ్ చేయబడిన విభిన్న కాంతి పరిస్థితులు మరియు వాతావరణ పరిస్థితులను జాబితా చేయండి, కాంతి పరిస్థితుల ద్వారా అక్షర క్రమానికి ఆదేశించండి.

src: List the light conditions and the weather conditions for each unique combination of these two factors that is associated with at least one accident.
mt: ప్రతి ప్రత్యేక కాంబినేషన్ కోసం కాంతి పరిస్థితులు మరియు వాతావరణ పరిస్థితులను జాబితా చేయండి, ఇది కనీసం ఒక ప్రమాదంతో సంబంధం కలిగి ఉంటుంది.

src: List the distinct light conditions and weather conditions for all environments that have at least one accident recorded, and sort the results alphabetically by the light conditions.
mt: కనీసం ఒక ప్రమాదం నమోదు చేయబడిన అన్ని పরిసరాల కోసం విభిన్న కాంతి పరిస్థితులు మరియు వాతావరణ పరిస్థితులను జాబితా చేయండి, మరియు ఫలితాలను కాంతి పరిస్థితుల ద్వారా అక్షర క్రమంలో క్రమబద్ధీకరించండి.

src: List the accident IDs for all accidents where the number of casualties is greater than 2 and the light conditions are 'Darkness - no lighting', sorted by the number of casualties in descending order.
mt: ఆపాతాల సంఖ్య 2 కంటే ఎక్కువ ఉన్న మరియు కాంతి పరిస్థితులు 'చీకటి - లైటింగ్ లేనిది' అయిన అన్ని ప్రమాదాల ప్రమాద ID లను జాబితా చేయండి, ఆపాతాల సంఖ్య ఆధారంగా అవరోహణ క్రమంలో క్రమబద్ధీకరించండి.

src: For environments where the light conditions are 'Darkness - no lighting', list each environment ID and the total count of accident IDs, provided that the sum of the number of casualties for that environment ID is greater than 5.
mt: 'Darkness - no lighting' అనే కాంతి పరిస్థితులు ఉన్న పরిసరాల కోసం, ప్రతి పరిసర ID మరియు ప్రమాదం IDల యొక్క మొత్తం సంఖ్యను జాబితా చేయండి, ఆ పరిసర ID కోసం ప్రమాదస్థులు సంఖ్య యొక్క మొత్తం 5 కంటే ఎక్కువ ఉందని అందించారు.

src: List the accident ID and the total sum of casualties for each accident where the light conditions were 'Darkness - no lighting' and the collision type was 'Vehicle with vehicle collision', specifically for those accidents where the total number of casualties is greater than 5, ordered from the highest number of casualties to the lowest.
mt: ప్రతి ప్రమాదం కోసం ప్రమాద ID మరియు మొత్తం ప్రమాదాల సంఖ్యను జాబితా చేయండి, ఇక్కడ కాంతి పరిస్థితులు 'చీకటి - లైటింగ్ లేనిది' మరియు ఘర్షణ రకం 'వాహనం వాహనం ఘర్షణ', ప్రత్యేకంగా ఆ ప్రమాదాల కోసం ఇక్కడ మొత్తం ప్రమాదాల సంఖ్య 5 కంటే ఎక్కువ, అత్యధిక సంఖ్యలో ప్రమాదాల నుండి అత్యల్ప సంఖ్యకు ఆదేశించబడింది.

src: List each accident severity and the count of occurrences for that severity, specifically for drivers with 1-2 years of driving experience, where the average accident ID for the group is greater than 1, ordered by the accident severity.
mt: 1-2 సంవత్సరాల డ్రైవింగ్ అనుభవం ఉన్న డ్రైవర్‌ల కోసం ప్రతి ప్రమాద తీవ్రత మరియు ఆ తీవ్రత యొక్క సంభవాల సంఖ్యను జాబితా చేయండి, ఇక్కడ సమూహం యొక్క సగటు ప్రమాద ID 1 కంటే ఎక్కువ ఉంది, ప్రమాద తీవ్రత ద్వారా ఆర్డర్ చేయబడింది.

src: Show all columns and details from the driver dimension for those drivers who have between 1-2 years of driving experience or whose educational level is junior high school.
mt: డ్రైవర్ డైమెన్షన్ నుండి అన్ని కాలమ్‌లు మరియు వివరాలను చూపించండి, వీరిలో 1-2 సంవత్సరాల డ్రైవింగ్ అనుభవం ఉన్న డ్రైవర్‌లకు లేదా వారి విద్యా స్థాయి జూనియర్ హైస్కూల్ ఉన్న వారికి.

src: List the driver ID and the age band of the driver for all records where the driving experience is '1-2yr' or the educational level is 'Junior high school', ordered by the driver ID.
mt: డ్రైవర్ ID మరియు డ్రైవర్ యొక్క వయస్సు బ్యాండ్‌ను జాబితా చేయండి, డ్రైవింగ్ అనుభవం '1-2yr' లేదా విద్యా స్థరం 'జూనియర్ హైస్కూల్' అయిన అన్ని రికార్డ్‌ల కోసం, డ్రైవర్ ID ద్వారా ఆర్డర్ చేయబడింది.

src: List the driving experience levels and the total count of accident IDs for drivers who either have '1-2yr' of driving experience or an educational level of 'Junior high school', grouping the results by driving experience and including only those groups with more than 1 accident.
mt: '1-2yr' డ్రైవింగ్ అనుభవం లేదా 'జూనియర్ హైస్కూల్' విద్యా స్థాయి ఉన్న డ్రైవర్‌ల కోసం డ్రైవింగ్ అనుభవ స్థాయిలను జాబితా చేయండి మరియు ప్రమాద ID ల మొత్తం సంఖ్యను చూపండి, ఫలితాలను డ్రైవింగ్ అనుభవం ద్వారా సమూహపరచండి మరియు 1 కంటే ఎక్కువ ప్రమాదాలు ఉన్న సమూహాలను మాత్రమే చేర్చండి.

src: List the driver ID, the age band of the driver, and the sex of the driver, along with the total count of accidents for each driver, specifically for those who have between 1-2 years of driving experience or whose educational level is 'Junior high school', including those with zero accidents, and order the results by the accident count in descending order.
mt: డ్రైవర్ ID, డ్రైవర్ యొక్క వయస్సు బ్యాండ్ మరియు డ్రైవర్ యొక్క లింగం, ప్రతి డ్రైవర్ కోసం మొత్తం ప్రమాదాల సంఖ్య, ప్రత్యేకంగా 1-2 సంవత్సరాల డ్రైవింగ్ అనుభవం ఉన్నవారు లేదా విద్యా స్థాయి 'జూనియర్ హైస్కూల్' ఉన్నవారు, సున్నా ప్రమాదాలు ఉన్నవారితో సహా, మరియు ఫలితాలను ప్రమాద సంఖ్య ఆధారంగా అవరోహణ క్రమంలో ఆర్డర్ చేయండి.

src: List the educational level, the driving experience, and the average number of casualties for each combination of educational level and driving experience, ordered by the average number of casualties.
mt: ప్రతి విద్యాసంబంధమైన స్థితి మరియు డ్రైవింగ్ అనుభవం యొక్క సమ్మేళనం కోసం విద్యాసంబంధమైన స్థితి, డ్రైవింగ్ అనుభవం మరియు సగటు ప్రాణనష్టాల సంఖ్యను జాబితా చేయండి, సగటు ప్రాణనష్టాల సంఖ్య ద్వారా ఆదేశించబడింది.

src: List the educational level and driving experience of drivers, along with the average number of casualties per accident, grouped by their educational level and driving experience, and sorted by the average number of casualties in descending order.
mt: డ్రైవర్ల విద్యా స్థరం మరియు డ్రైవింగ్ అనుభవాన్ని జాబితా చేయండి, ప్రతి ప్రమాదానికి సగటు ప్రమాద సంఖ్య కూడా చేర్చండి, వాటిని విద్యా స్థరం మరియు డ్రైవింగ్ అనుభవం ద్వారా సమూహపరచండి, మరియు సగటు ప్రమాద సంఖ్య ఆధారంగా అవరోహణ క్రమంలో క్రమబద్ధీకరించండి.

src: List the educational level and the driving experience of drivers, grouped by these two attributes, where the average number of casualties in accidents is greater than one, and sort the results by that average value.
mt: డ్రైవర్ల విద్యా స్థరం మరియు డ్రైవింగ్ అనుభవాన్ని ఈ రెండు లక్షణాల ద్వారా సమూహపరచి జాబితా చేయండి, ఇక్కడ ప్రమాదాలలో సగటు ప్రాణనష్టం ఒకటి కంటే ఎక్కువ ఉంది, మరియు ఫలితాలను ఆ సగటు విలువ ద్వారా క్రమబద్ధీకరించండి.

src: For male drivers in the age bands of '31-50' or '18-30', list their educational level and driving experience along with the average number of casualties per accident, specifically for those groups with more than one accident, and order the results by the average casualty count in descending order.
mt: 31-50 లేదా 18-30 వయస్సు గ్రూపుల్లో ఉన్న పురుష డ్రైవర్ల కోసం, వారి విద్యా స్థాయి మరియు డ్రైవింగ్ అనుభవాన్ని ప్రమాదానికి సంబంధించిన సగటు ప్రాణనష్టాల సంఖ్య కూడా జాబితా చేయండి, ప్రత్యేకంగా ఒకటి కంటే ఎక్కువ ప్రమాదాలు ఉన్న గ్రూపుల కోసం, మరియు ఫలితాలను సగటు ప్రాణనష్ట సంఖ్య ఆధారంగా అవరోహణ క్రమంలో ఆర్డర్ చేయండి.

src: List the educational levels of drivers involved in at least one accident that occurred on a Sunday, and display these educational levels in ascending alphabetical order.
mt: కనీసం ఒక ఆదివారం రోజున సంభవించిన ప్రమాదంలో పాల్గొన్న డ్రైవర్ల విద్యా స్థాయిలను జాబితా చేయండి, మరియు ఈ విద్యా స్థాయిలను ఆరోహణ వర్ణక్రమ క్రమంలో ప్రదర్శించండి.

src: List the accident IDs for accidents where the number of casualties is greater than 2 and the driver involved has 1-2 years of driving experience.
mt: Accident IDs list karo un accidents ke liye jahan casualties ki sankhya 2 se zyada ho aur jo driver involved hai uske paas 1-2 saal ka driving experience ho.

src: List the accident IDs for all accidents where the number of casualties is greater than 2 and the driver involved has 1-2 years of driving experience.
mt: Accident IDs list karo un sabhi accidents ke liye jahan casualties ki sankhya 2 se zyada ho aur jo driver involved hai uske paas 1-2 saal ka driving experience ho.

src: List each accident severity and the total count of accident IDs for drivers with 1-2 years of driving experience, showing only those severity levels that have more than one accident, and order the results by the accident severity.
mt: Har accident severity ke liye total accident IDs ka count dikhao un drivers ke liye jinke paas 1-2 saal ka driving experience hai, lekin sirf un severity levels ko show karo jinke paas ek se zyada accidents hain, aur results ko accident severity ke according order karo.

src: List the accident IDs for cases involving drivers with 1-2 years of driving experience, where the total sum of casualties for each accident is greater than 3, ordered by the maximum number of casualties in descending order.
mt: Accident IDs list karo un cases ke liye jahan drivers ke paas 1-2 years ka driving experience ho, aur jahan har accident ke liye total casualties ka sum 3 se zyada ho, aur result ko maximum casualties ke basis par descending order mein arrange karo.

src: For each age band of the driver, list the age band, the average number of casualties, and the total count of accident IDs.
mt: Driver ke har age band ke liye, age band ko list karo, average number of casualties ko dikhao, aur total count of accident IDs ko batao.

src: For each age band of the driver, list the age band itself, the average number of casualties, and the total count of accident IDs.
mt: Driver ke har age band ke liye, age band ko list karo, average number of casualties ko dikhao, aur total count of accident IDs ko batao.

src: For each age band of the driver, list the age band, the average number of casualties, and the total count of accident IDs, filtering for groups where the average number of casualties is greater than one and ordering the results by the accident count in descending order.
mt: Driver ke har age band ke liye, age band ko list karo, average number of casualties ko, aur total count of accident IDs ko, filtering karte hue un groups ke liye jahan average number of casualties ek se zyada ho, aur results ko accident count ke basis par descending order mein arrange karo.

src: Grouped by the age band of the driver, what is the age band, the average number of casualties, and the total count of unique accident IDs for those drivers involved in more than one accident, ordered by the average number of casualties in descending order?
mt: Driver ke age band ke hisaab se group karke, batao age band kya hai, average casualties kitni hain, aur un drivers ke liye unique accident IDs ka total count kitna hai jinhe ek se zyada accidents mein involve hona pada hai, aur result ko average casualties ke basis par descending order mein arrange karo?

src: List the top 5 age bands of drivers and casualty severities that have the highest average number of casualties, showing the age band, the average number of casualties, and the casualty severity for each group.
mt: Top 5 age bands aur casualty severities ko dikhao jinke paas sabse zyada average number of casualties hai. Har group ke liye age band, average number of casualties, aur casualty severity dikha.

src: List the age band of the driver and the average number of casualties for each age band, sorted by the average number of casualties in descending order, showing only the top 5 results.
mt: Driver ke age band ko list karo aur har age band ke liye average number of casualties dikhao, sorted by average number of casualties descending order mein, sirf top 5 results dikha ke.

src: Show the age band of the driver, the average number of casualties, and the casualty severity, grouped by driver age band and casualty severity, for those groups where the average number of casualties is greater than one, and list the top 5 results in descending order of the average casualties.
mt: Driver ke age band ko dikhao, average casualties ki sankhya, aur casualty severity, sab ko group karo driver age band aur casualty severity ke hisaab se, sirf un groups ke liye jahan average casualties ek se zyada ho, aur top 5 results ko list karo average casualties ke descending order mein.

src: List the age band of the driver, the average number of casualties, and the total sum of casualty severity for the top 5 driver age bands with more than one accident, ordered by the average number of casualties in descending order.
mt: Driver ke age band ko list karo, average casualties ki sankhya, aur total casualty severity ka sum dikhao. Top 5 driver age bands ke liye jo ek se zyada accidents hain, unhe average casualties ke basis par descending order mein arrange karo.

src: Show all columns from the casualty dimension for records where the casualty class is 'Pedestrian' and the fitness of the casualty is 'Normal'.
mt: Casualty dimension se sab columns dikhao un records ke liye jahan casualty class 'Pedestrian' hai aur casualty ki fitness 'Normal' hai.

src: List the casualty ID and the sex of the casualty for all individuals classified as pedestrians whose fitness was recorded as normal, ordered alphabetically by their sex.
mt: Casualty ID aur casualty ke sex ko list karo un sabhi individuals ke liye jo pedestrians classify hote hain aur jinka fitness normal record hua hai, unhe alphabetically order karo unke sex ke basis par.

src: List the casualty IDs for casualties classified as pedestrians where the fitness of the casualty is normal, grouped by their casualty ID.
mt: Casualty IDs ko list karo un casualties ke liye jo pedestrians classify hain jahan casualty ki fitness normal hai, aur unhe casualty ID ke basis par group karo.

src: List the casualty ID, the casualty class, the sex of the casualty, and the accident severity for casualties classified as 'Pedestrian' who have a 'Normal' fitness level, ensuring each casualty is associated with at least one accident, and order the results by the casualty class.
mt: Casualty ID, casualty class, casualty ka sex, aur accident severity dikhao un casualties ke liye jo 'Pedestrian' classify hain aur jinhe 'Normal' fitness level hai. Ensure karo ki har casualty ke paas kam se kam ek accident associated ho, aur results ko casualty class ke hisaab se order karo.

src: For casualties classified as pedestrians, list each sex of casualty and the corresponding average casualty severity, grouped by the sex of casualty.
mt: Pedestrians ke roop mein classify kiye gaye casualties ke liye, har ek sex ke casualties ko list karo aur unke corresponding average casualty severity ko dikhao, sex of casualty ke basis par grouped.

src: For casualties classified as pedestrians, list each sex of casualty along with the average casualty severity, grouped by the sex of the casualty.
mt: Pedestrians ke roop mein classified casualties ke liye, har sex ke casualties ko list karo unke saath average casualty severity ke saath, grouped by casualty ka sex.

src: For casualties classified as pedestrians, list each sex of casualty and their corresponding average casualty severity, filtering for groups where the average severity is greater than 1, and order the results by the sex of the casualty.
mt: Pedestrians ke roop mein classify kiye gaye casualties ke liye, har ek sex ke casualties ko list karo aur unka corresponding average casualty severity dikhao. Sirf un groups ko filter karo jahan average severity 1 se zyada ho, aur results ko sex of casualty ke hisaab se order karo.

src: Show the sex of casualty and the average casualty severity for casualties who are either a driver, rider, or pedestrian and fall within the age bands of 18-30 or 31-50, grouped by their sex, where the average severity is greater than 1, and order the results by the average casualty severity in descending order.
mt: Casualty ka sex aur average casualty severity dikhao un casualties ke liye jo driver, rider, ya pedestrian hain aur jinki age 18-30 ya 31-50 ke beech mein hai. Results ko sex ke hisaab se group karo, jahan average severity 1 se zyada ho, aur results ko average casualty severity ke hisaab se descending order mein arrange karo.

src: List the casualty class and the average casualty severity for each class, ordered from highest to lowest average severity, and show only the top 10 results.
mt: Casualty class aur har class ke liye average casualty severity dikhao, highest se lowest average severity ke hisaab se order karte hue, aur sirf top 10 results dikha.

src: Show the casualty class and the average casualty severity for each casualty class, ordered by the average severity from highest to lowest, and list only the top 10 results.
mt: Casualty class aur har casualty class ke liye average casualty severity dikhao, aur unhe average severity ke basis par highest se lowest tak order karo, aur sirf top 10 results dikhao.

src: List the casualty classes where the average casualty severity is greater than 1, ordered by the average severity from highest to lowest, and show only the top 10 results.
mt: Casualty classes ko list karo jahan average casualty severity 1 se zyada ho, aur unhe average severity ke basis par highest se lowest tak order karo, aur sirf top 10 results dikhao.

src: List the casualty class and the average casualty severity for each casualty class, ordered by the average casualty severity in descending order, showing only the top 10 results.
mt: Casualty class aur average casualty severity ko list karo har ek casualty class ke liye, average casualty severity ke basis par descending order mein sort karke, sirf top 10 results dikhao.

src: List the sex, age band, and work status of the casualty, along with the casualty severity, ordered by the severity level from highest to lowest.
mt: Casualty ke sex, age band, aur work status ko list karo, saath mein casualty severity bhi dikhao, aur severity level ke basis par highest se lowest tak order karo.

src: List the sex, age band, and work status of each casualty, along with their casualty severity, sorted by the severity of the casualty in descending order.
mt: Har casualty ke liye sex, age band, aur work status ko list karo, unke casualty severity ke saath, aur casualty ke severity ke basis par descending order mein sort karo.

src: List the sex of the casualty, the age band of the casualty, and the work status of the casualty, along with the average casualty severity for each of these groups, where the average casualty severity is greater than 1.
mt: Casualty ka sex, casualty ka age band, aur casualty ka work status dikhao, saath mein har group ke liye average casualty severity bhi dikhao, jahan average casualty severity 1 se zyada ho.

src: List the sex of the casualty, the age band of the casualty, the work status of the casualty, and the casualty severity, along with the total count of accident IDs for each of these groups, where there is at least one accident, sorted by the casualty severity in descending order.
mt: Casualty ka sex, casualty ka age band, casualty ka work status, aur casualty severity dikhao, saath mein har ek group ke liye total count of accident IDs, jahan par kam se kam ek accident ho, aur casualty severity ke basis par descending order mein sort karo.

src: List the casualty IDs for casualties classified as pedestrians where the casualty severity level is 2.
mt: Pedestrian classify kiye gaye casualties ke casualty IDs list karo jahan casualty severity level 2 hai.

src: List the casualty IDs for all casualties classified as pedestrians where the casualty severity level is 2.
mt: Pedestrian ke roop mein classify kiye gaye sabhi casualties ke casualty IDs list karo jahan casualty severity level 2 hai.

src: List the casualty class and the total count of bridge accident casualty IDs for records where the casualty severity is 2, specifically filtering for and showing only the 'Pedestrian' casualty class, ordered by the casualty class.
mt: Casualty class aur bridge accident casualty IDs ka total count dikhao un records ke liye jahan casualty severity 2 hai, aur sirf 'Pedestrian' casualty class ke liye filter karke results dikhao, casualty class ke hisaab se order karke.

src: Show the casualty class for all records where the casualty class is 'Pedestrian' and the casualty severity is level 2, grouped and ordered by the casualty class.
mt: Casualty class dikhao un sabhi records ke liye jahan casualty class 'Pedestrian' hai aur casualty severity level 2 hai, grouped aur ordered by casualty class ke saath.

src: For accidents occurring on a Monday, list each area where an accident occurred along with the average number of casualties and the total count of accident IDs, grouped by the area of the accident.
mt: Monday ko hone wale accidents ke liye, har ek area ko list karo jahan accident hua tha, saath mein average number of casualties aur total count of accident IDs, sab kuch area ke hisaab se group kiya hua.

src: For accidents that occurred on a Friday, list each area where an accident occurred along with the average number of casualties and the total count of accident IDs for each of those areas.
mt: Joh accidents Friday ko hua hain, unke liye har area ke liye list karo jahan accident hua tha, saath mein average number of casualties aur har area ke liye total count of accident IDs.

src: For accidents that occurred on a Monday, list each area where an accident occurred, the average number of casualties per accident in that area, and the total count of accident IDs, ensuring only areas with at least one accident are shown and ordering the results by the average number of casualties from highest to lowest.
mt: Joh accidents Monday ko hua hain, unke liye har area ke liye ye batao: area ka naam, us area mein accidents ke average casualties, aur total accident IDs ki count. Sirf woh areas dikhao jinmein kam se kam ek accident hua ho. Results ko average casualties ke basis par highest se lowest order mein arrange karo.

src: For accidents that occurred on a Monday, list each area where the accident occurred along with the average number of casualties and the total count of accident IDs, grouped by the area and ordered by the average casualties in descending order.
mt: Monday ko jo accidents hue hain, unke liye har area ke liye accident occur hone ki jagah list karo aur average casualties aur total accident IDs ka count dikhao, area ke hisaab se group karo aur average casualties ke basis par descending order mein arrange karo.

src: List the unique areas where accidents occurred for incidents that either involved more than five casualties or took place on a Sunday.
mt: Unique areas dikhao jahan par accidents hua hain, aur ye incidents ya toh 5 se zyada casualties involve karte hain ya phir Sunday ko hua hain.

src: List the area where the accident occurred for all records where either the number of casualties is greater than five or the day of the week is Sunday.
mt: Un sab records ke liye accident jo jagah par hua wo list karo jahan casualties ki sankhya paanch se zyada hai ya phir din Sunday hai.

src: List the areas where accidents occurred, ordered alphabetically, for those areas where the maximum number of casualties in a single accident exceeds 5 or where the count of days of the week recorded is greater than 1.
mt: Un sab areas ko list karo jahan accidents hua, alphabetically order mein, un areas ke liye jahan ek single accident mein maximum casualties 5 se zyada ho ya jahan days of the week ka count 1 se zyada ho.

src: List the areas where accidents occurred for those locations that have experienced at least one accident with more than five casualties or at least one accident occurring on a Sunday or Monday, and sort the results alphabetically by the area name.
mt: Un sab areas ko list karo jahan accidents hua hai, un locations ke liye jo either ek accident mein 5 se zyada casualties ke saath experience kiye hain ya phir ek accident jo Sunday ya Monday ko hua ho. Results ko area name ke hisaab se alphabetically sort karo.

src: List the areas where accidents occurred for all incidents that took place on a Sunday involving more than one vehicle, grouped and ordered by the accident area.
mt: Wo sab areas batao jahan par accidents hua hai, un sabhi incidents ke liye jo Sunday ko hua tha aur jisme ek se zyada vehicles involved the, aur results ko accident area ke hisaab se group karke order karo.

src: List the areas where accidents occurred for incidents involving more than one vehicle on a Sunday, specifically for those areas where no accidents occurred on a Monday.
mt: Wo areas dikhao jahan accidents hue hain jab ek se zyada vehicles involve the, aur ye Sunday ko hua ho. Lekin sirf un areas ke liye jo Monday ko kisi accident se free the.

src: For each area where an accident occurred, list the area name and the average number of casualties, sorted from highest to lowest average casualties.
mt: Har ek area ke liye jahan par accident hua hai, area ka naam aur average number of casualties ko list karo, sabko highest se lowest average casualties ke hisaab se sort karke.

src: For each area where an accident occurred, list the area name and the average number of casualties, sorted in descending order by the average casualty count.
mt: Har ek area ke liye jahan accident hua hai, area ka naam aur average number of casualties ko list karo, aur ise descending order mein sort karo average casualty count ke basis par.

src: List the areas where accidents occurred for which the average number of casualties is greater than 1, and order the results by this average in descending order.
mt: Un sabhi areas ko list karo jahan accidents hua hai, jahan average number of casualties 1 se zyada hai, aur results ko is average ke basis par descending order mein arrange karo.

src: For each area where an accident occurred, provided there are more than one accident recorded, list the area name and the average number of casualties, sorted from the highest average to the lowest.
mt: Har ek area ke liye jahan par accident hua hai, agar usme ek se zyada accidents recorded hain, toh us area ka naam aur average number of casualties dikhao, sabse zyada average se sabse kam average tak sort karke.

src: List the light conditions for accidents where the number of casualties is greater than two, specifically for those light conditions that appear more than once in the records.
mt: Accidents ke liye light conditions list karo jahan casualties ki sankhya do se zyada ho, aur sirf un light conditions ko dikhao jo records mein ek se zyada baar aaye hain.

src: List the distinct light conditions for accidents where the number of casualties is greater than two and the day of the week is not Sunday, ordered alphabetically by the light conditions.
mt: Distinct light conditions dikhao un accidents ke liye jahan casualties ki sankhya do se zyada ho aur din Sunday na ho, aur light conditions ko alphabetically order karo.

src: Show the light conditions, the weather conditions, and the total number of casualties, grouped by both light and weather conditions, and ordered from the highest to the lowest sum of casualties.
mt: Light conditions, weather conditions, aur total number of casualties dikhao, dono light aur weather conditions ke hisaab se group karke, aur casualties ke sum ke basis par highest se lowest tak order karke.

src: List the light conditions and weather conditions along with the total number of casualties for each combination, grouped by light and weather conditions and ordered by the total casualties in descending order.
mt: Light conditions aur weather conditions ko list karo saath mein total casualties ke saath har combination ke liye, grouped by light aur weather conditions aur ordered by total casualties descending order mein.

src: List the light conditions and weather conditions for all environmental settings where the total number of casualties exceeds 2, and display these results in descending order based on the total sum of casualties.
mt: Environmental settings mein se un sabko list karo jahan total casualties 2 se zyada hain. Inke liye light conditions aur weather conditions dikhao, aur results ko total casualties ke sum ke basis par descending order mein arrange karo.

src: List the light conditions and weather conditions along with the total number of casualties for each combination, where the total casualties exceed 2, and order the results from the highest number of casualties to the lowest.
mt: Light conditions aur weather conditions ko list karo saath mein total number of casualties ke liye har combination ke liye, jahan total casualties 2 se zyada ho, aur results ko highest number of casualties se lowest tak order karo.

src: List the distinct light conditions and weather conditions recorded for all accidents, and sort the results by the light conditions.
mt: Distinct light conditions aur weather conditions ko list karo jo sab accidents ke liye record kiye gaye hain, aur results ko light conditions ke basis par sort karo.

src: List the distinct light conditions and weather conditions recorded for accidents, ordered alphabetically by the light conditions.
mt: Accidents ke liye recorded distinct light conditions aur weather conditions ko list karo, light conditions ke according alphabetically order mein.

src: List the light conditions and the weather conditions for each unique combination of these two factors that is associated with at least one accident.
mt: Har ek unique combination ke liye light conditions aur weather conditions list karo jo light aur weather dono factors ke liye associated hai, aur jisme at least ek accident ho.

src: List the distinct light conditions and weather conditions for all environments that have at least one accident recorded, and sort the results alphabetically by the light conditions.
mt: Distinct light conditions aur weather conditions ko list karo un sabhi environments ke liye jinke paas at least ek accident record hai, aur results ko light conditions ke hisaab se alphabetically sort karo.

src: List the accident IDs for all accidents where the number of casualties is greater than 2 and the light conditions are 'Darkness - no lighting', sorted by the number of casualties in descending order.
mt: Accident IDs list karo un sabhi accidents ke liye jahan casualties ki sankhya 2 se zyada ho aur light conditions 'Darkness - no lighting' ho, casualties ki sankhya ke basis par descending order mein sort karke.

src: For environments where the light conditions are 'Darkness - no lighting', list each environment ID and the total count of accident IDs, provided that the sum of the number of casualties for that environment ID is greater than 5.
mt: Jis environments mein light conditions 'Darkness - no lighting' hain, un sabke liye environment ID aur total count of accident IDs dikhao, lekin sirf un environments ke liye jahan environment ID ke liye total casualties ka sum 5 se zyada ho.

src: List the accident ID and the total sum of casualties for each accident where the light conditions were 'Darkness - no lighting' and the collision type was 'Vehicle with vehicle collision', specifically for those accidents where the total number of casualties is greater than 5, ordered from the highest number of casualties to the lowest.
mt: Accident ID aur total casualties ka sum dikhao har ek accident ke liye jahan light conditions 'Darkness - no lighting' the aur collision type 'Vehicle with vehicle collision' tha, specifically un accidents ke liye jahan total casualties 5 se zyada hain, casualties ke count ke basis par highest se lowest tak order karke.

src: List each accident severity and the count of occurrences for that severity, specifically for drivers with 1-2 years of driving experience, where the average accident ID for the group is greater than 1, ordered by the accident severity.
mt: Har accident severity ke liye list karo aur us severity ke occurrences ki count dikhao, specifically un drivers ke liye jinke paas 1-2 saal ka driving experience hai, jahan par us group ke liye average accident ID 1 se zyada ho, aur result ko accident severity ke hisaab se order karo.

src: Show all columns and details from the driver dimension for those drivers who have between 1-2 years of driving experience or whose educational level is junior high school.
mt: Driver dimension se sab columns aur details dikhao un drivers ke liye jinke paas 1-2 years ka driving experience hai ya jo junior high school level ke hain.

src: List the driver ID and the age band of the driver for all records where the driving experience is '1-2yr' or the educational level is 'Junior high school', ordered by the driver ID.
mt: Driver ID aur driver ke age band ko list karo un sabhi records ke liye jahan driving experience '1-2yr' hai ya educational level 'Junior high school' hai, aur result ko driver ID ke hisaab se order karo.

src: List the driving experience levels and the total count of accident IDs for drivers who either have '1-2yr' of driving experience or an educational level of 'Junior high school', grouping the results by driving experience and including only those groups with more than 1 accident.
mt: Driving experience levels aur accident IDs ka total count dikhao un drivers ke liye jinke paas '1-2yr' driving experience hai ya phir 'Junior high school' educational level hai. Results ko driving experience ke basis par group karo aur sirf un groups ko include karo jinme 1 se zyada accidents hain.

src: List the driver ID, the age band of the driver, and the sex of the driver, along with the total count of accidents for each driver, specifically for those who have between 1-2 years of driving experience or whose educational level is 'Junior high school', including those with zero accidents, and order the results by the accident count in descending order.
mt: Driver ID, driver ka age band, aur driver ka sex dikhao, saath mein har ek driver ke liye total accidents ka count bhi, specifically un drivers ke liye jinke paas 1-2 years ka driving experience hai ya jo 'Junior high school' level ki education rakhte hain, aur jo zero accidents wale drivers bhi shamil hain, aur results ko accident count ke basis par descending order mein arrange karo.

src: List the educational level, the driving experience, and the average number of casualties for each combination of educational level and driving experience, ordered by the average number of casualties.
mt: Har educational level aur driving experience ke combination ke liye, educational level, driving experience, aur average number of casualties dikhao, aur isko average number of casualties ke hisaab se order karo.

src: List the educational level and driving experience of drivers, along with the average number of casualties per accident, grouped by their educational level and driving experience, and sorted by the average number of casualties in descending order.
mt: Drivers ke educational level aur driving experience ke saath unke accidents mein average casualties dikhao, educational level aur driving experience ke hisaab se group karo, aur average casualties ke basis par descending order mein sort karo.

src: List the educational level and the driving experience of drivers, grouped by these two attributes, where the average number of casualties in accidents is greater than one, and sort the results by that average value.
mt: Drivers ke educational level aur driving experience ko list karo, in dono attributes ke basis par group karte hue, jahan par accidents mein average casualties ek se zyada ho, aur results ko us average value ke basis par sort karo.

src: For male drivers in the age bands of '31-50' or '18-30', list their educational level and driving experience along with the average number of casualties per accident, specifically for those groups with more than one accident, and order the results by the average casualty count in descending order.
mt: Male drivers jo '31-50' ya '18-30' age bands mein hain, unke liye unka educational level aur driving experience dikhao saath mein average number of casualties per accident bhi. Lekin sirf un groups ko include karna jo ek se zyada accidents wale hain. Results ko average casualty count ke basis par descending order mein arrange karna.

src: List the educational levels of drivers involved in at least one accident that occurred on a Sunday, and display these educational levels in ascending alphabetical order.
mt: Unhe drivers ke educational levels dikhao jinhe kam se kam ek accident hua ho aur wo accident Sunday ko hua ho. In educational levels ko ascending alphabetical order mein display karo.

src: List the accident IDs for accidents where the number of casualties is greater than 2 and the driver involved has 1-2 years of driving experience.
mt: उन दुर्घटनाओं के लिए दुर्घटना आईडी की सूची बनाएं जहां हताहतों की संख्या 2 से अधिक है और शामिल ड्राइवर के पास 1-2 साल का ड्राइविंग अनुभव है।

src: List the accident IDs for all accidents where the number of casualties is greater than 2 and the driver involved has 1-2 years of driving experience.
mt: उन सभी दुर्घटनाओं के लिए दुर्घटना आईडी की सूची बनाएं जहां हताहतों की संख्या 2 से अधिक है और शामिल ड्राइवर के पास 1-2 साल का ड्राइविंग अनुभव है।

src: List each accident severity and the total count of accident IDs for drivers with 1-2 years of driving experience, showing only those severity levels that have more than one accident, and order the results by the accident severity.
mt: प्रत्येक दुर्घटना की गंभीरता और 1-2 साल की ड्राइविंग अनुभव वाले ड्राइवरों के लिए दुर्घटना आईडी की कुल संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, केवल उन गंभीरता स्तरों को दिखाते हुए जिनमें एक से अधिक दुर्घटनाएं हैं, और परिणामों को दुर्घटना की गंभीरता के आधार पर क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: List the accident IDs for cases involving drivers with 1-2 years of driving experience, where the total sum of casualties for each accident is greater than 3, ordered by the maximum number of casualties in descending order.
mt: उन दुर्घटना IDs की सूची बनाएं जिनमें 1-2 साल की ड्राइविंग अनुभव वाले ड्राइवर शामिल हैं, जहां प्रत्येक दुर्घटना के लिए हताहतों का कुल योग 3 से अधिक है, अधिकतम हताहतों की संख्या के आधार पर अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध।

src: For each age band of the driver, list the age band, the average number of casualties, and the total count of accident IDs.
mt: प्रत्येक ड्राइवर की आयु वर्ग के लिए, आयु वर्ग, दुर्घटनाओं की औसत संख्या, और दुर्घटना आईडी की कुल गणना सूचीबद्ध करें।

src: For each age band of the driver, list the age band itself, the average number of casualties, and the total count of accident IDs.
mt: प्रत्येक ड्राइवर की आयु वर्ग के लिए, आयु वर्ग को सूचीबद्ध करें, हताहतों की औसत संख्या, और दुर्घटना आईडी की कुल गणना।

src: For each age band of the driver, list the age band, the average number of casualties, and the total count of accident IDs, filtering for groups where the average number of casualties is greater than one and ordering the results by the accident count in descending order.
mt: प्रत्येक ड्राइवर की आयु वर्ग के लिए, आयु वर्ग, दुर्घटनाओं की औसत संख्या, और दुर्घटना आईडी की कुल गणना सूचीबद्ध करें, उन समूहों के लिए फ़िल्टर करें जहां दुर्घटनाओं की औसत संख्या एक से अधिक है और परिणामों को दुर्घटना गणना के अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: Grouped by the age band of the driver, what is the age band, the average number of casualties, and the total count of unique accident IDs for those drivers involved in more than one accident, ordered by the average number of casualties in descending order?
mt: ड्राइवर की आयु बैंड के आधार पर समूहीकृत करते हुए, उन ड्राइवरों के लिए आयु बैंड, हताहतों की औसत संख्या, और अद्वितीय दुर्घटना आईडी की कुल गणना क्या है जो एक से अधिक दुर्घटनाओं में शामिल हैं, हताहतों की औसत संख्या के आधार पर अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध?

src: List the top 5 age bands of drivers and casualty severities that have the highest average number of casualties, showing the age band, the average number of casualties, and the casualty severity for each group.
mt: ड्राइवरों के शीर्ष 5 आयु समूहों और हताहत गंभीरता को सूचीबद्ध करें जिनमें हताहतों की सर्वोच्च औसत संख्या है, प्रत्येक समूह के लिए आयु समूह, हताहतों की औसत संख्या और हताहत गंभीरता दिखाते हुए।

src: List the age band of the driver and the average number of casualties for each age band, sorted by the average number of casualties in descending order, showing only the top 5 results.
mt: ड्राइवर की आयु वर्ग और प्रत्येक आयु वर्ग के लिए औसत हताहतों की संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, औसत हताहतों की संख्या के आधार पर अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें, केवल शीर्ष 5 परिणाम दिखाएं।

src: Show the age band of the driver, the average number of casualties, and the casualty severity, grouped by driver age band and casualty severity, for those groups where the average number of casualties is greater than one, and list the top 5 results in descending order of the average casualties.
mt: ड्राइवर की आयु वर्ग, हताहतों की औसत संख्या, और हताहत की गंभीरता दिखाएं, ड्राइवर आयु वर्ग और हताहत की गंभीरता के अनुसार समूहीकृत करें, उन समूहों के लिए जहां हताहतों की औसत संख्या एक से अधिक है, और हताहतों की औसत संख्या के अवरोही क्रम में शीर्ष 5 परिणाम सूचीबद्ध करें।

src: List the age band of the driver, the average number of casualties, and the total sum of casualty severity for the top 5 driver age bands with more than one accident, ordered by the average number of casualties in descending order.
mt: ड्राइवर की आयु वर्ग, दुर्घटनाओं की औसत संख्या, और एक से अधिक दुर्घटनाओं वाले शीर्ष 5 ड्राइवर आयु वर्गों के लिए हताहतों की गंभीरता का कुल योग सूचीबद्ध करें, जिसे हताहतों की औसत संख्या के आधार पर अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध किया गया हो।

src: Show all columns from the casualty dimension for records where the casualty class is 'Pedestrian' and the fitness of the casualty is 'Normal'.
mt: हताहत आयाम से सभी कॉलम दिखाएं जहां हताहत वर्ग 'पैदल यात्री' है और हताहत की फिटनेस 'सामान्य' है।

src: List the casualty ID and the sex of the casualty for all individuals classified as pedestrians whose fitness was recorded as normal, ordered alphabetically by their sex.
mt: सभी पैदल यात्रियों के रूप में वर्गीकृत व्यक्तियों के लिए हताहत आईडी और हताहत का लिंग सूचीबद्ध करें जिनकी फिटनेस सामान्य के रूप में दर्ज की गई थी, उनके लिंग के अनुसार वर्णक्रम में क्रमबद्ध।

src: List the casualty IDs for casualties classified as pedestrians where the fitness of the casualty is normal, grouped by their casualty ID.
mt: दुर्घटना में घायलों की आईडी सूचीबद्ध करें जो पैदल यात्रियों के रूप में वर्गीकृत हैं जहां घायल की फिटनेस सामान्य है, उनकी दुर्घटना आईडी द्वारा समूहीकृत।

src: List the casualty ID, the casualty class, the sex of the casualty, and the accident severity for casualties classified as 'Pedestrian' who have a 'Normal' fitness level, ensuring each casualty is associated with at least one accident, and order the results by the casualty class.
mt: दुर्घटना गंभीरता के साथ 'पैदल यात्री' के रूप में वर्गीकृत और 'सामान्य' फिटनेस स्तर वाले हताहतों के लिए हताहत आईडी, हताहत वर्ग, हताहत का लिंग, और दुर्घटना गंभीरता सूचीबद्ध करें, यह सुनिश्चित करते हुए कि प्रत्येक हताहत कम से कम एक दुर्घटना से जुड़ा है, और परिणामों को हताहत वर्ग के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: For casualties classified as pedestrians, list each sex of casualty and the corresponding average casualty severity, grouped by the sex of casualty.
mt: पैदल यात्रियों के रूप में वर्गीकृत हताहतों के लिए, हताहत के प्रत्येक लिंग और संबंधित औसत हताहत गंभीरता को सूचीबद्ध करें, हताहत के लिंग के अनुसार समूहीकृत करें।

src: For casualties classified as pedestrians, list each sex of casualty along with the average casualty severity, grouped by the sex of the casualty.
mt: पैदल यात्रियों के रूप में वर्गीकृत हताहतों के लिए, हताहत के प्रत्येक लिंग को हताहत की औसत गंभीरता के साथ सूचीबद्ध करें, हताहत के लिंग के अनुसार समूहीकृत।

src: For casualties classified as pedestrians, list each sex of casualty and their corresponding average casualty severity, filtering for groups where the average severity is greater than 1, and order the results by the sex of the casualty.
mt: पैदल यात्रियों के रूप में वर्गीकृत हताहतों के लिए, प्रत्येक हताहत के लिंग और उनकी संबंधित औसत हताहत गंभीरता को सूचीबद्ध करें, उन समूहों के लिए फ़िल्टर करें जहां औसत गंभीरता 1 से अधिक है, और परिणामों को हताहत के लिंग के आधार पर क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: Show the sex of casualty and the average casualty severity for casualties who are either a driver, rider, or pedestrian and fall within the age bands of 18-30 or 31-50, grouped by their sex, where the average severity is greater than 1, and order the results by the average casualty severity in descending order.
mt: दुर्घटना पीड़ितों के लिंग और औसत दुर्घटना गंभीरता दिखाएं जो ड्राइवर, राइडर या पैदल यात्री हैं और 18-30 या 31-50 आयु वर्ग में आते हैं, उनके लिंग के अनुसार समूहीकृत करें, जहां औसत गंभीरता 1 से अधिक है, और परिणामों को औसत दुर्घटना गंभीरता के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: List the casualty class and the average casualty severity for each class, ordered from highest to lowest average severity, and show only the top 10 results.
mt: प्रत्येक वर्ग के लिए हताहत वर्ग और औसत हताहत गंभीरता सूचीबद्ध करें, सर्वोच्च से निम्नतम औसत गंभीरता के क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें, और केवल शीर्ष 10 परिणाम दिखाएं।

src: Show the casualty class and the average casualty severity for each casualty class, ordered by the average severity from highest to lowest, and list only the top 10 results.
mt: प्रत्येक हताहत वर्ग के लिए हताहत वर्ग और औसत हताहत गंभीरता दिखाएं, औसत गंभीरता के आधार पर उच्चतम से निम्नतम क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें, और केवल शीर्ष 10 परिणाम सूचीबद्ध करें।

src: List the casualty classes where the average casualty severity is greater than 1, ordered by the average severity from highest to lowest, and show only the top 10 results.
mt: उन हताहत वर्गों की सूची बनाएं जहां औसत हताहत गंभीरता 1 से अधिक है, औसत गंभीरता के आधार पर सर्वोच्च से निम्नतम क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें, और केवल शीर्ष 10 परिणाम दिखाएं।

src: List the casualty class and the average casualty severity for each casualty class, ordered by the average casualty severity in descending order, showing only the top 10 results.
mt: प्रत्येक हताहत वर्ग के लिए हताहत वर्ग और औसत हताहत गंभीरता को सूचीबद्ध करें, औसत हताहत गंभीरता के आधार पर अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें, केवल शीर्ष 10 परिणाम दिखाएं।

src: List the sex, age band, and work status of the casualty, along with the casualty severity, ordered by the severity level from highest to lowest.
mt: दुर्घटना पीड़ित के लिंग, आयु वर्ग और कार्य स्थिति को दुर्घटना की गंभीरता के साथ सूचीबद्ध करें, गंभीरता स्तर के अनुसार उच्चतम से निम्नतम क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।

src: List the sex, age band, and work status of each casualty, along with their casualty severity, sorted by the severity of the casualty in descending order.
mt: प्रत्येक हताहत की लिंग, आयु वर्ग, और कार्य स्थिति को उनकी हताहत की गंभीरता के साथ सूचीबद्ध करें, हताहत की गंभीरता के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: List the sex of the casualty, the age band of the casualty, and the work status of the casualty, along with the average casualty severity for each of these groups, where the average casualty severity is greater than 1.
mt: हताहत के लिंग, हताहत की आयु वर्ग, और हताहत की कार्य स्थिति को सूचीबद्ध करें, साथ ही इन प्रत्येक समूहों के लिए औसत हताहत गंभीरता, जहां औसत हताहत गंभीरता 1 से अधिक है।

src: List the sex of the casualty, the age band of the casualty, the work status of the casualty, and the casualty severity, along with the total count of accident IDs for each of these groups, where there is at least one accident, sorted by the casualty severity in descending order.
mt: हताहत का लिंग, हताहत की आयु वर्ग, हताहत की कार्य स्थिति, और हताहत की गंभीरता सूचीबद्ध करें, साथ ही इन प्रत्येक समूह के लिए दुर्घटना आईडी की कुल संख्या, जहां कम से कम एक दुर्घटना हो, हताहत की गंभीरता के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध।

src: List the casualty IDs for casualties classified as pedestrians where the casualty severity level is 2.
mt: उन हताहतों के लिए हताहत आईडी की सूची बनाएं जिन्हें पैदल यात्री के रूप में वर्गीकृत किया गया है जहां हताहत की गंभीरता स्तर 2 है।

src: List the casualty IDs for all casualties classified as pedestrians where the casualty severity level is 2.
mt: सभी पैदल यात्रियों के रूप में वर्गीकृत हताहतों के लिए हताहत आईडी की सूची बनाएं जहां हताहत गंभीरता स्तर 2 है।

src: List the casualty class and the total count of bridge accident casualty IDs for records where the casualty severity is 2, specifically filtering for and showing only the 'Pedestrian' casualty class, ordered by the casualty class.
mt: दुर्घटना की गंभीरता 2 वाले रिकॉर्ड के लिए हताहत वर्ग और पुल दुर्घटना हताहत आईडी की कुल गणना सूचीबद्ध करें, विशेष रूप से 'पैदल यात्री' हताहत वर्ग के लिए फ़िल्टर करें और केवल दिखाएं, हताहत वर्ग द्वारा क्रमबद्ध।

src: Show the casualty class for all records where the casualty class is 'Pedestrian' and the casualty severity is level 2, grouped and ordered by the casualty class.
mt: सभी रिकॉर्ड के लिए हताहत वर्ग दिखाएं जहां हताहत वर्ग 'पैदल यात्री' है और हताहत गंभीरता स्तर 2 है, हताहत वर्ग द्वारा समूहीकृत और क्रमबद्ध।

src: For accidents occurring on a Monday, list each area where an accident occurred along with the average number of casualties and the total count of accident IDs, grouped by the area of the accident.
mt: सोमवार को होने वाली दुर्घटनाओं के लिए, प्रत्येक क्षेत्र को सूचीबद्ध करें जहां दुर्घटना हुई थी, साथ ही औसत हताहतों की संख्या और दुर्घटना आईडी की कुल गिनती, दुर्घटना के क्षेत्र के अनुसार समूहीकृत।

src: For accidents that occurred on a Friday, list each area where an accident occurred along with the average number of casualties and the total count of accident IDs for each of those areas.
mt: शुक्रवार को हुई दुर्घटनाओं के लिए, प्रत्येक क्षेत्र को सूचीबद्ध करें जहां दुर्घटना हुई थी, साथ ही प्रत्येक उन क्षेत्रों के लिए हताहतों की औसत संख्या और दुर्घटना आईडी की कुल गिनती।

src: For accidents that occurred on a Monday, list each area where an accident occurred, the average number of casualties per accident in that area, and the total count of accident IDs, ensuring only areas with at least one accident are shown and ordering the results by the average number of casualties from highest to lowest.
mt: सोमवार को हुई दुर्घटनाओं के लिए, प्रत्येक क्षेत्र को सूचीबद्ध करें जहां दुर्घटना हुई, उस क्षेत्र में प्रति दुर्घटना औसत हताहतों की संख्या, और दुर्घटना आईडी की कुल गिनती, यह सुनिश्चित करते हुए कि केवल कम से कम एक दुर्घटना वाले क्षेत्र दिखाए जाएं और परिणामों को सर्वोच्च से निम्नतम औसत हताहतों की संख्या के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: For accidents that occurred on a Monday, list each area where the accident occurred along with the average number of casualties and the total count of accident IDs, grouped by the area and ordered by the average casualties in descending order.
mt: सोमवार को हुई दुर्घटनाओं के लिए, प्रत्येक क्षेत्र को सूचीबद्ध करें जहां दुर्घटना हुई थी, साथ ही औसत हताहतों की संख्या और दुर्घटना आईडी की कुल गिनती, क्षेत्र के अनुसार समूहीकृत और औसत हताहतों के अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध।

src: List the unique areas where accidents occurred for incidents that either involved more than five casualties or took place on a Sunday.
mt: उन अद्वितीय क्षेत्रों की सूची बनाएं जहां दुर्घटनाएं हुईं, जिनमें या तो पांच से अधिक हताहत हुए हों या जो रविवार को हुई हों।

src: List the area where the accident occurred for all records where either the number of casualties is greater than five or the day of the week is Sunday.
mt: उन सभी रिकॉर्ड के लिए दुर्घटना के घटित होने वाले क्षेत्र की सूची बनाएं जहां या तो हताहतों की संख्या पांच से अधिक है या सप्ताह का दिन रविवार है।

src: List the areas where accidents occurred, ordered alphabetically, for those areas where the maximum number of casualties in a single accident exceeds 5 or where the count of days of the week recorded is greater than 1.
mt: उन क्षेत्रों को सूचीबद्ध करें जहां दुर्घटनाएं हुईं, वर्णक्रम के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध, उन क्षेत्रों के लिए जहां एक एकल दुर्घटना में अधिकतम हताहतों की संख्या 5 से अधिक है या जहां सप्ताह के दिनों की गिनती 1 से अधिक है।

src: List the areas where accidents occurred for those locations that have experienced at least one accident with more than five casualties or at least one accident occurring on a Sunday or Monday, and sort the results alphabetically by the area name.
mt: उन स्थानों के लिए दुर्घटनाओं के क्षेत्रों की सूची बनाएं जहां कम से कम एक दुर्घटना पांच से अधिक हताहतों के साथ हुई है या कम से कम एक दुर्घटना रविवार या सोमवार को हुई है, और परिणामों को क्षेत्र के नाम के अनुसार वर्णक्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: List the areas where accidents occurred for all incidents that took place on a Sunday involving more than one vehicle, grouped and ordered by the accident area.
mt: उन सभी घटनाओं के लिए दुर्घटना के क्षेत्रों की सूची बनाएं जो रविवार को हुई थीं और जिनमें एक से अधिक वाहन शामिल थे, दुर्घटना के क्षेत्र के अनुसार समूहीकृत और क्रमबद्ध।

src: List the areas where accidents occurred for incidents involving more than one vehicle on a Sunday, specifically for those areas where no accidents occurred on a Monday.
mt: उन क्षेत्रों की सूची बनाएं जहां रविवार को एक से अधिक वाहनों वाली घटनाओं में दुर्घटनाएं हुईं, विशेष रूप से उन क्षेत्रों के लिए जहां सोमवार को कोई दुर्घटना नहीं हुई।

src: For each area where an accident occurred, list the area name and the average number of casualties, sorted from highest to lowest average casualties.
mt: प्रत्येक क्षेत्र के लिए जहां कोई दुर्घटना हुई, क्षेत्र का नाम और औसत हताहतों की संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, जिसे सर्वोच्च से निम्नतम औसत हताहतों के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध किया जाए।

src: For each area where an accident occurred, list the area name and the average number of casualties, sorted in descending order by the average casualty count.
mt: प्रत्येक क्षेत्र के लिए जहां कोई दुर्घटना हुई, क्षेत्र का नाम और औसत हताहतों की संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, औसत हताहतों की संख्या के आधार पर अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: List the areas where accidents occurred for which the average number of casualties is greater than 1, and order the results by this average in descending order.
mt: उन क्षेत्रों की सूची बनाएं जहां दुर्घटनाएं हुईं जिनमें औसत हताहतों की संख्या 1 से अधिक है, और परिणामों को इस औसत के आधार पर अवरोही क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।

src: For each area where an accident occurred, provided there are more than one accident recorded, list the area name and the average number of casualties, sorted from the highest average to the lowest.
mt: प्रत्येक क्षेत्र के लिए जहां दुर्घटना हुई है, बशर्ते कि एक से अधिक दुर्घटनाएं दर्ज की गई हों, क्षेत्र का नाम और हताहतों की औसत संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, जिसे सर्वोच्च औसत से निम्नतम तक क्रमबद्ध किया जाए।

src: List the light conditions for accidents where the number of casualties is greater than two, specifically for those light conditions that appear more than once in the records.
mt: उन दुर्घटनाओं के लिए प्रकाश की स्थितियों की सूची बनाएं जहां हताहतों की संख्या दो से अधिक है, विशेष रूप से उन प्रकाश स्थितियों के लिए जो रिकॉर्ड में एक से अधिक बार दिखाई देती हैं।

src: List the distinct light conditions for accidents where the number of casualties is greater than two and the day of the week is not Sunday, ordered alphabetically by the light conditions.
mt: विभिन्न प्रकाश स्थितियों की सूची दिखाएं जहां हताहतों की संख्या दो से अधिक है और सप्ताह का दिन रविवार नहीं है, प्रकाश स्थितियों के अनुसार वर्णक्रम में क्रमबद्ध।

src: Show the light conditions, the weather conditions, and the total number of casualties, grouped by both light and weather conditions, and ordered from the highest to the lowest sum of casualties.
mt: प्रकाश की स्थितियों, मौसम की स्थितियों और कुल हताहतों की संख्या दिखाएं, प्रकाश और मौसम दोनों स्थितियों के आधार पर समूहीकृत करें, और हताहतों के योग के आधार पर उच्चतम से निम्नतम क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।

src: List the light conditions and weather conditions along with the total number of casualties for each combination, grouped by light and weather conditions and ordered by the total casualties in descending order.
mt: प्रकाश की स्थितियों और मौसम की स्थितियों को सूचीबद्ध करें, साथ ही प्रत्येक संयोजन के लिए कुल हताहतों की संख्या दें, प्रकाश और मौसम की स्थितियों के अनुसार समूहीकृत करें और कुल हताहतों के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: List the light conditions and weather conditions for all environmental settings where the total number of casualties exceeds 2, and display these results in descending order based on the total sum of casualties.
mt: उन सभी पर्यावरणीय सेटिंग्स के लिए प्रकाश की स्थिति और मौसम की स्थिति सूचीबद्ध करें जहां कुल हताहतों की संख्या 2 से अधिक है, और इन परिणामों को कुल हताहतों के योग के आधार पर अवरोही क्रम में प्रदर्शित करें।

src: List the light conditions and weather conditions along with the total number of casualties for each combination, where the total casualties exceed 2, and order the results from the highest number of casualties to the lowest.
mt: प्रकाश की स्थितियों और मौसम की स्थितियों को कुल हताहतों की संख्या के साथ सूचीबद्ध करें, जहां कुल हताहत 2 से अधिक हों, और परिणामों को सर्वोच्च हताहतों की संख्या से सबसे कम तक क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: List the distinct light conditions and weather conditions recorded for all accidents, and sort the results by the light conditions.
mt: सभी दुर्घटनाओं के लिए दर्ज किए गए अलग-अलग प्रकाश स्थितियों और मौसम स्थितियों की सूची बनाएं, और परिणामों को प्रकाश स्थितियों के आधार पर क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: List the distinct light conditions and weather conditions recorded for accidents, ordered alphabetically by the light conditions.
mt: दुर्घटनाओं के लिए दर्ज किए गए अलग-अलग प्रकाश स्थितियों और मौसम स्थितियों की सूची बनाएं, प्रकाश स्थितियों के अनुसार वर्णक्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: List the light conditions and the weather conditions for each unique combination of these two factors that is associated with at least one accident.
mt: प्रत्येक अद्वितीय संयोजन के लिए प्रकाश की स्थितियों और मौसम की स्थितियों की सूची बनाएं जो कम से कम एक दुर्घटना से जुड़ा हो।

src: List the distinct light conditions and weather conditions for all environments that have at least one accident recorded, and sort the results alphabetically by the light conditions.
mt: उन सभी वातावरणों के लिए अलग-अलग प्रकाश स्थितियों और मौसम स्थितियों की सूची बनाएं जिनमें कम से कम एक दुर्घटना दर्ज की गई है, और परिणामों को प्रकाश स्थितियों के आधार पर वर्णक्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: List the accident IDs for all accidents where the number of casualties is greater than 2 and the light conditions are 'Darkness - no lighting', sorted by the number of casualties in descending order.
mt: उन सभी दुर्घटनाओं के लिए दुर्घटना आईडी की सूची बनाएं जहां हताहतों की संख्या 2 से अधिक है और प्रकाश की स्थिति 'अंधकार - कोई प्रकाश नहीं' है, हताहतों की संख्या के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध।

src: For environments where the light conditions are 'Darkness - no lighting', list each environment ID and the total count of accident IDs, provided that the sum of the number of casualties for that environment ID is greater than 5.
mt: उन वातावरणों के लिए जहां प्रकाश की स्थिति 'अंधकार - कोई प्रकाश नहीं' है, प्रत्येक वातावरण ID और दुर्घटना IDs की कुल संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, बशर्ते कि उस वातावरण ID के लिए हताहतों की संख्या का योग 5 से अधिक हो।

src: List the accident ID and the total sum of casualties for each accident where the light conditions were 'Darkness - no lighting' and the collision type was 'Vehicle with vehicle collision', specifically for those accidents where the total number of casualties is greater than 5, ordered from the highest number of casualties to the lowest.
mt: उन सभी दुर्घटनाओं के लिए दुर्घटना ID और कुल हताहतों का योग सूचीबद्ध करें जहां प्रकाश की स्थिति 'अंधकार - कोई प्रकाश नहीं' थी और टकराव का प्रकार 'वाहन से वाहन टकराव' था, विशेष रूप से उन दुर्घटनाओं के लिए जहां कुल हताहतों की संख्या 5 से अधिक है, सबसे अधिक हताहतों से लेकर सबसे कम तक क्रमबद्ध।

src: List each accident severity and the count of occurrences for that severity, specifically for drivers with 1-2 years of driving experience, where the average accident ID for the group is greater than 1, ordered by the accident severity.
mt: प्रत्येक दुर्घटना की गंभीरता और उस गंभीरता की घटनाओं की संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, विशेष रूप से 1-2 वर्ष की ड्राइविंग अनुभव वाले ड्राइवरों के लिए, जहां समूह के लिए औसत दुर्घटना आईडी 1 से अधिक है, दुर्घटना की गंभीरता के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध।

src: Show all columns and details from the driver dimension for those drivers who have between 1-2 years of driving experience or whose educational level is junior high school.
mt: ड्राइवर डाइमेंशन से सभी कॉलम और विवरण दिखाएं उन ड्राइवरों के लिए जिनके पास 1-2 साल का ड्राइविंग अनुभव है या जिनकी शैक्षणिक स्तर जूनियर हाई स्कूल है।

src: List the driver ID and the age band of the driver for all records where the driving experience is '1-2yr' or the educational level is 'Junior high school', ordered by the driver ID.
mt: ड्राइवर आईडी और ड्राइवर की आयु वर्ग सूचीबद्ध करें सभी रिकॉर्ड के लिए जहां ड्राइविंग अनुभव '1-2yr' है या शैक्षणिक स्तर 'Junior high school' है, ड्राइवर आईडी के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध।

src: List the driving experience levels and the total count of accident IDs for drivers who either have '1-2yr' of driving experience or an educational level of 'Junior high school', grouping the results by driving experience and including only those groups with more than 1 accident.
mt: उन ड्राइवरों के लिए ड्राइविंग अनुभव स्तरों और दुर्घटना आईडी की कुल संख्या की सूची बनाएं जिनके पास '1-2yr' का ड्राइविंग अनुभव है या शैक्षणिक स्तर 'जूनियर हाई स्कूल' है, परिणामों को ड्राइविंग अनुभव के आधार पर समूहित करें और केवल उन समूहों को शामिल करें जिनके पास 1 से अधिक दुर्घटनाएं हैं।

src: List the driver ID, the age band of the driver, and the sex of the driver, along with the total count of accidents for each driver, specifically for those who have between 1-2 years of driving experience or whose educational level is 'Junior high school', including those with zero accidents, and order the results by the accident count in descending order.
mt: ड्राइवर आईडी, ड्राइवर की आयु वर्ग, और ड्राइवर का लिंग सूचीबद्ध करें, साथ ही प्रत्येक ड्राइवर के लिए दुर्घटनाओं की कुल संख्या, विशेष रूप से उन लोगों के लिए जिनके पास 1-2 साल का ड्राइविंग अनुभव है या जिनका शैक्षणिक स्तर 'जूनियर हाई स्कूल' है, शून्य दुर्घटनाओं वाले लोगों सहित, और परिणामों को दुर्घटना गणना के आधार पर अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: List the educational level, the driving experience, and the average number of casualties for each combination of educational level and driving experience, ordered by the average number of casualties.
mt: शैक्षणिक स्तर, ड्राइविंग अनुभव, और शैक्षणिक स्तर तथा ड्राइविंग अनुभव के प्रत्येक संयोजन के लिए औसत हताहतों की संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, औसत हताहतों की संख्या के आधार पर क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: List the educational level and driving experience of drivers, along with the average number of casualties per accident, grouped by their educational level and driving experience, and sorted by the average number of casualties in descending order.
mt: ड्राइवरों के शैक्षणिक स्तर और ड्राइविंग अनुभव को सूचीबद्ध करें, साथ ही प्रति दुर्घटना में औसत हताहतों की संख्या, उनके शैक्षणिक स्तर और ड्राइविंग अनुभव के अनुसार समूहीकृत, और औसत हताहतों की संख्या के आधार पर अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध।

src: List the educational level and the driving experience of drivers, grouped by these two attributes, where the average number of casualties in accidents is greater than one, and sort the results by that average value.
mt: ड्राइवरों की शैक्षणिक स्तर और ड्राइविंग अनुभव को सूचीबद्ध करें, इन दोनों विशेषताओं के अनुसार समूहीकृत करें, जहां दुर्घटनाओं में हताहतों की औसत संख्या एक से अधिक हो, और परिणामों को उस औसत मान के आधार पर क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: For male drivers in the age bands of '31-50' or '18-30', list their educational level and driving experience along with the average number of casualties per accident, specifically for those groups with more than one accident, and order the results by the average casualty count in descending order.
mt: 31-50 या 18-30 आयु वर्ग के पुरुष ड्राइवरों के लिए, उनके शैक्षणिक स्तर और ड्राइविंग अनुभव को दुर्घटना प्रति औसत हताहतों की संख्या के साथ सूचीबद्ध करें, विशेष रूप से उन समूहों के लिए जिनके पास एक से अधिक दुर्घटनाएं हैं, और परिणामों को औसत हताहत गणना के अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।

src: List the educational levels of drivers involved in at least one accident that occurred on a Sunday, and display these educational levels in ascending alphabetical order.
mt: रविवार को हुई कम से कम एक दुर्घटना में शामिल ड्राइवरों के शैक्षणिक स्तरों की सूची बनाएं, और इन शैक्षणिक स्तरों को आरोही वर्णानुक्रमिक क्रम में प्रदर्शित करें।

src: List all the districts located in the state of Bihar.
mt: बिहार राज्य में स्थित सभी जिलों की सूची बनाएं।

src: List all the districts in the state of Assam in alphabetical order.
mt: असम राज्य के सभी जिलों को वर्णानुक्रम में सूचीबद्ध करें।

src: Provide an alphabetized list of all districts located within the state of Bihar.
mt: बिहार राज्य में स्थित सभी जिलों की एक वर्णानुक्रमित सूची प्रदान करें।

src: Provide a count of districts for each state, listed in alphabetical order by state name.
mt: प्रत्येक राज्य के लिए जिलों की संख्या प्रदान करें, राज्य के नाम के वर्णानुक्रम में सूचीबद्ध किया गया।

src: List the names of districts in Assam that contain more than one rural sub-district, sorted alphabetically.
mt: असम के उन जिलों के नाम सूचीबद्ध करें जिनमें एक से अधिक ग्रामीण उप-जिले हैं, वर्णानुक्रम में क्रमबद्ध।

src: Provide a list of all districts, organized alphabetically by state and then by district name.
mt:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
सभी जिलों की एक सूची प्रदान करें, जो राज्य और फिर जिले के नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में व्यवस्थित हो।

src: List the names of the top five districts in Assam that contain more than one sub-district, sorted in reverse alphabetical order.
mt: असम के शीर्ष पांच जिलों के नाम बताएं जिनमें एक से अधिक उप-जिले हैं, उल्टे वर्णानुक्रम में क्रमबद्ध।

src: List all districts in India along with the names of the states they belong to.

mt: ২০২১ সালে চার বা তার বেশি প্রসবপূর্ব চেকআপ পাওয়া গর্ভবতী মহিলাদের মোট সংখ্যার ভিত্তিতে শহুরে উপজেলাগুলোকে ক্রমানুসারে সাজান, সর্বোচ্চ সংখ্যা দিয়ে শুরু করে।

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than 500 women registered for antenatal care within their first trimester during the year 2021.
mt: ২০২১ সালে যেসব উপজেলায় প্রথম ত্রৈমাসিকে ৫০০ জনের বেশি নারী প্রসবপূর্ব যত্নের জন্য নিবন্ধিত হয়েছেন, তাদের চিহ্নিত করুন এবং তাদের এলাকার ধরন নির্ধারণ করুন।

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than five antenatal care registrations were recorded within the first trimester during the year 2021.
mt:
এই প্রশ্নটি অনুবাদ করুন:
২০২১ সালে প্রথম ত্রৈমাসিকে পাঁচটির বেশি প্রসবপূর্ব যত্ন নিবন্ধন রেকর্ড করা হয়েছে এমন উপজেলা এবং তাদের এলাকার ধরন চিহ্নিত করুন।

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than five antenatal care registrations were recorded within the first trimester during the year 2021.
mt:
এই প্রশ্নটি অনুবাদ করুন:

src: Identify the rural sub-districts that had maternal ANC registrations in 2022 but did not record any in 2021.
mt:
এই প্রশ্নটি অনুবাদ করুন:
২০২২ সালে যেসব গ্রামীণ উপজেলায় মাতৃত্বকালীন এএনসি নিবন্ধন ছিল কিন্তু ২০২১ সালে কোনো নিবন্ধন রেকর্ড করা হয়নি, সেগুলি চিহ্নিত করুন।

src: List the names of rural sub-districts, in alphabetical order, where more than 5,000 pregnant women have registered for antenatal care.
mt: গ্রামীণ উপজেলাগুলির নাম তালিকাভুক্ত করুন, বর্ণানুক্রমিকভাবে, যেখানে ৫,০০০-এর বেশি গর্ভবতী মহিলা প্রসবপূর্ব যত্নের জন্য নিবন্ধিত হয়েছেন।

src: For the year 2021, provide a breakdown by area type showing the total number of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 and the average number of hemoglobin tests conducted.
mt: ২০২১ সালের জন্য, এলাকার ধরন অনুযায়ী একটি বিভাজন প্রদান করুন যা হিমোগ্লোবিনের মাত্রা ১১-এর নিচে থাকা গর্ভবতী মহিলাদের মোট সংখ্যা এবং পরিচালিত হিমোগ্লোবিন পরীক্ষার গড় সংখ্যা দেখাবে।

src: For the year 2021, provide a breakdown by area type of the total number of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 and the average number of hemoglobin tests conducted, specifically for areas where the count of low-hemoglobin cases is under 38, sorted by the total cases in descending order.
mt: ২০২১ সালের জন্য, ১১-এর নিচে হিমোগ্লোবিন মাত্রা রয়েছে এমন গর্ভবতী নারীদের মোট সংখ্যা এবং গড় হিমোগ্লোবিন পরীক্ষার সংখ্যা এলাকার ধরন অনুযায়ী একটি বিভাজন প্রদান করুন, বিশেষভাবে সেইসব এলাকার জন্য যেখানে নিম্ন-হিমোগ্লোবিনের ঘটনার সংখ্যা ৩৮-এর কম, মোট ঘটনার সংখ্যার অধঃক্রম অনুসারে সাজানো।

src: Which rural sub-districts reported more than 500 cases of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 during the year 2021?

src: Which rural sub-districts reported more than 500 pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 in the year 2021?

src: Provide a breakdown of sub-districts and their area types, showing the total count of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 for the first year, focusing only on records where the count is less than 38 and ranking the results from highest to lowest.
mt:
এই প্রশ্নের বাংলা অনুবাদ:
উপজেলা এবং তাদের এলাকার ধরনের একটি বিভাজন প্রদান করুন, প্রথম বছরের জন্য হিমোগ্লোবিন স্তর ১১-এর নিচে থাকা গর্ভবতী মহিলাদের মোট সংখ্যা দেখিয়ে, শুধুমাত্র সেই রেকর্ডগুলিতে ফোকাস করুন যেখানে সংখ্যা ৩৮-এর কম এবং ফলাফলগুলো সর্বোচ্চ থেকে সর্বনিম্ন ক্রমে র্যাঙ্ক করুন।

src: Identify the top 5 rural sub-districts with the highest number of pregnant women recorded with hemoglobin levels below 11 in 2021.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where fewer than 38 pregnant women had hemoglobin levels below 11 in September 2020, excluding areas with no recorded cases.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than five pregnant women were recorded with hemoglobin levels below 11 during September 2020.

src: Provide a list of all districts, organized alphabetically by state and then by district name.
mt: రాష్ట్రాల వారీగా మరియు తరువాత జిల్లా పేర్ల వారీగా అక్షర క్రమంలో అన్ని జిల్లాల జాబితాను అందించండి.

src: List the names of the top five districts in Assam that contain more than one sub-district, sorted in reverse alphabetical order.
mt: అస్సాంలో ఒకటి కంటే ఎక్కువ ఉపజిల్లాలు ఉన్న టాప్ ఐదు జిల్లాల పేర్లను రివర్స్ అక్షర క్రమంలో జాబితా చేయండి.

src: List all districts in India along with the names of the states they belong to.
mt: భారతదేశంలోని అన్ని జిల్లాలను వాటి రాష్ట్రాల పేర్లతో జాబితా చేయండి.

src: Provide an alphabetized list of all districts in India, organized by their respective states.
mt: భారతదేశంలోని అన్ని జిల్లాలను వాటి సంబంధిత రాష్ట్రాల ప్రకారం అక్షర క్రమంలో జాబితా చేయండి.

src: Identify the names of districts that are located in Assam but do not share a name with any district in Bihar.
mt: అస్సాంలో ఉన్న కానీ బీహార్లో ఏ జిల్లాతో పేరు పంచుకోని జిల్లాల పేర్లను గుర్తించండి.

src: Identify the districts in Assam that do not share a name with any district in Bihar.
mt: అస్సాంలో బీహార్లో ఏ జిల్లాకు పేరు పోలని జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Confirm the name of the state of Assam from the list of states that have recorded district information.
mt: జిల్లా సమాచారం నమోదు చేసిన రాష్ట్రాల జాబితా నుండి అస్సాం రాష్ట్రం పేరును నిర్ధారించండి.

src: List all the districts located within the states of Assam and the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.
mt: అస్సాం మరియు అండమాన్ మరియు నికోబార్ దీవుల రాష్ట్రాల్లో ఉన్న జిల్లాలను జాబితా చేయండి.

src: List the names of all states and their corresponding districts for the Andaman and Nicobar Islands or the Nicobars district, sorted alphabetically by state.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
అండమాన్ మరియు నికోబార్ దీవులు లేదా నికోబార్ జిల్లా కోసం అన్ని రాష్ట్రాల పేర్లు మరియు వాటి సంబంధిత జిల్లాలను, రాష్ట్రాల అక్షర క్రమంలో క్రమబద్ధీకరించి జాబితా చేయండి.

src: Provide an alphabetical list of all rural sub-districts, including their names and IDs.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
అన్ని గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాల యొక్క అక్షర క్రమ జాబితాను, వాటి పేర్లు మరియు ఐడీలతో సహా అందించండి.

src: Provide a breakdown of the number of sub-districts by area type for each state, sorted alphabetically by state name and then by the highest count.
mt: ప్రతి రాష్ట్రానికి ప్రాంతాల రకం ప్రకారం ఉపజిల్లాల సంఖ్య వివరణను అందించండి, రాష్ట్ర పేరు ఆధారంగా అక్షర క్రమంలో మరియు తర్వాత అత్యధిక గణన ఆధారంగా క్రమబద్ధీకరించండి.

src: List the names of all rural sub-districts located in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.
mt: అండమాన్ మరియు నికోబార్ దీవులలో ఉన్న అన్ని గ్రామీణ ఉపజిల్లాల పేర్లను జాబితా చేయండి.

src: List the names of all rural sub-districts located in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, sorted alphabetically.
mt: అండమాన్ మరియు నికోబార్ దీవులలో ఉన్న అన్ని గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాల పేర్లను అక్షర క్రమంలో జాబితా చేయండి.

src: List the sub-districts and their corresponding area types located within the state of Assam, sorted alphabetically by name.
mt: అస్సాం రాష్ట్రంలో ఉన్న ఉప-జిల్లాలు మరియు వాటి సంబంధిత ప్రాంతాల రకాలను పేరు వారీగా క్రమబద్ధీకరించి జాబితా చేయండి.

src: List the names and area types of all sub-districts located within the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, sorted alphabetically by area type and name.
mt: అండమాన్ మరియు నికోబార్ దీవులలో ఉన్న అన్ని ఉపజిల్లాల పేర్లు మరియు ప్రాంత రకాలను, ప్రాంత రకం మరియు పేరు ఆధారంగా అక్షర క్రమంలో జాబితా చేయండి.

src: Which five states have the highest number of rural sub-districts?
mt: ఏ ఐదు రాష్ట్రాలలో గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాల సంఖ్య ఎక్కువగా ఉంది?

src: List the names of all rural sub-districts along with their corresponding district and state.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
అన్ని గ్రామీణ ఉప జిల్లాల పేర్లను వాటి సంబంధిత జిల్లా మరియు రాష్ట్రంతో జాబితా చేయండి.

src: Identify the sub-districts that are classified exclusively as urban areas and have no rural components.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
ఉప-జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి, ఇవి ప్రత్యేకంగా పట్టణ ప్రాంతాలుగా వర్గీకరించబడ్డాయి మరియు గ్రామీణ భాగాలు లేవు.

src: List the names of all sub-districts that are classified exclusively as urban areas, sorted alphabetically.
mt: అన్ని పట్టణ ప్రాంతాలుగా ప్రత్యేకంగా వర్గీకరించబడిన అన్ని మండలాల పేర్లను అక్షర క్రమంలో జాబితా చేయండి.

src: Provide a list containing the name 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' along with the names of all rural sub-districts.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
'అండమాన్ మరియు నికోబార్ దీవులు' పేరును మరియు అన్ని గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాల పేర్లను కలిగి ఉన్న జాబితాను అందించండి.

src: Show the allopathic outpatient attendance figures for the month of September 2020.
mt: సెప్టెంబర్ 2020 నెలకు ఆలోపతి బయటి రోగుల హాజరు సంఖ్యను చూపించండి.

src: List the outpatient IDs and their corresponding allopathic attendance counts for December 2022, focusing only on those with recorded visits, sorted from highest to lowest attendance.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను అనువదించండి:
డిసెంబర్ 2022లో రికార్డ్ చేయబడిన సందర్శనలు మాత్రమే ఉన్న వారికి, అత్యధిక నుండి తక్కువ హాజరు వరుస క్రమంలో, అవుట్ పేషెంట్ ID లు మరియు వాటి సంబంధిత అల్లోపతి హాజరు గణనలను జాబితా చేయండి.

src: Provide a yearly breakdown of the total allopathic outpatient attendance, ordered chronologically.
mt: మొత్తం అలోపతి రోగుల ఔట్‌పేటెంట్ హాజరు వివరాలను కాలక్రమానుసారంగా విభజించి, సంవత్సరం వారీగా ఇవ్వండి.

src: Rank the months of 2022 by their total allopathic outpatient attendance, from highest to lowest.
mt: 2022లో మొత్తం ఆలోపతి బాహ్య రోగుల హాజరు ప్రకారం నెలలను అత్యధికం నుండి అత్యల్పం వరకు ర్యాంక్ చేయండి.

src: Rank the months of 2022 from highest to lowest based on the total number of allopathic outpatient visits.
mt: 2022లో అలోపతి బయటి రోగుల సందర్శనల మొత్తం సంఖ్య ఆధారంగా నెలలను అత్యధికం నుండి అత్యల్పం వరకు ర్యాంక్ చేయండి.

src: Provide a monthly breakdown of total allopathic outpatient attendance for the year 2022, ranked from highest to lowest volume.
mt: 2022 సంవత్సరంలో మొత్తం అలోపతి బయటి రోగుల హాజరు వివరాలను నెలవారీగా అత్యధికం నుండి అత్యల్పం వరకు ర్యాంక్ చేసి అందించండి.

src: Identify the sub-districts that recorded allopathic outpatient attendance in 2022 but had no such attendance reported in 2021.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2022లో ఆలోపతిక్ అవుట్పేషంట్ హాజరును నమోదు చేసిన, కానీ 2021లో అటువంటి హాజరు నమోదు చేయని ఉపజిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Identify the sub-districts that recorded allopathic outpatient attendance in 2022 but had no such attendance in 2021.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2022లో ఆలోపతిక్ అవుట్‌పేషెంట్ హాజరును నమోదు చేసిన, కానీ 2021లో అటువంటి హాజరు లేని ఉపజిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Which sub-districts recorded outpatient services in both 2021 and 2022?
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులోకి అనువదించండి:
2021 మరియు 2022లో ఏ ఉపజిల్లాలు రెండు సంవత్సరాల్లోనూ బయటి రోగుల సేవలను నమోదు చేశాయి?

src: Identify the months that either belong to the year 2022 or recorded more than 5,000 allopathic outpatient visits, sorted alphabetically.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను అనువదించండి:
2022 సంవత్సరానికి చెందిన లేదా 5,000 కంటే ఎక్కువ ఆలోపతి బయటి రోగుల సందర్శనలను నమోదు చేసిన నెలలను గుర్తించండి, వర్ణమాల క్రమంలో క్రమబద్ధీకరించబడింది.

src: Provide the annual total for allopathic outpatient attendance across all recorded years.
mt: అన్ని నమోదైన సంవత్సరాలలో అలోపతి బయటి రోగుల హాజరు సంవత్సరానికి మొత్తాన్ని అందించండి.

src: Provide a yearly breakdown of total allopathic outpatient attendance across both rural and urban areas, ordered chronologically.
mt: గ్రామీణ మరియు పట్టణ ప్రాంతాల్లో మొత్తం ఆలోపతీ బయటి రోగుల హాజరును కాలక్రమానుసారం క్రమబద్ధీకరించి, సంవత్సరానికి వివరణాత్మక విభజనను అందించండి.

src: Which rural sub-districts recorded a total allopathic outpatient attendance of more than 5,000 during the year 2021?
mt: ఏ గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాలు 2021 సంవత్సరంలో మొత్తం ఆలోపతిక బాహ్య రోగుల హాజరు 5,000 కంటే ఎక్కువగా నమోదు చేశాయి?

src: Rank the sub-districts and their area types by the total number of allopathic outpatient visits recorded throughout 2021, starting with the highest attendance.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021 సంవత్సరం పూర్తి కాలంలో నమోదు చేయబడిన అన్ని ఆలోపతిక అవుట్‌పేషెంట్ సందర్శనల మొత్తం సంఖ్య ఆధారంగా, ఉప-జిల్లాలు మరియు వాటి ప్రాంతాల రకాలను ర్యాంక్ చేయండి, అత్యధిక హాజరుతో ప్రారంభించండి.
