src: Rank the sub-districts and their area types by the total number of allopathic outpatient visits recorded throughout 2021, starting with the highest attendance.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను అనువదించండి:
2021 సంవత్సరంలో నమోదైన అన్ని అలోపతి బయటి రోగుల సందర్శనల మొత్తం సంఖ్య ఆధారంగా, ఉపజిల్లాలు మరియు వాటి ప్రాంతాల రకాలను అత్యధిక హాజరు నుండి ప్రారంభించి ర్యాంక్ చేయండి.

src: Which five rural sub-districts had the highest total allopathic outpatient attendance in 2021?
mt: 2021లో అత్యధిక మొత్తం ఆలోపతిక్ అవుట్పేషెంట్ హాజరు ఏ ఐదు గ్రామీణ మండలాలలో ఉంది?

src: Identify the top 5 rural sub-districts with the highest total allopathic outpatient attendance for the year 2021.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021 సంవత్సరంలో అత్యధిక మొత్తం అల్లోపతి బయటి రోగుల హాజరు కలిగిన టాప్ 5 గ్రామీణ ఉప జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Which five rural sub-districts recorded the highest total allopathic outpatient attendance during the year 2021?
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021 సంవత్సరంలో అత్యధిక మొత్తం అలోపతి బయటి రోగుల హాజరు నమోదు చేసిన ఐదు గ్రామీణ ఉప జిల్లాలు ఏవి?

src: Rank the sub-districts and their area types by the total volume of allopathic outpatient attendance recorded throughout the year 2021, starting with the highest.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021 సంవత్సరం పూర్తి సమయంలో నమోదు చేయబడిన అన్ని ఆలోపతిక బయటి రోగుల హాజరు మొత్తం పరిమాణం ఆధారంగా, ఉపజిల్లాలు మరియు వాటి ప్రాంతాల రకాలను అత్యధికం నుండి ప్రారంభించి ర్యాంక్ చేయండి.

src: Identify the rural sub-districts that recorded allopathic outpatient attendance in 2022, excluding any sub-districts that also have urban areas with reported attendance for that same year.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2022లో ఆలోపతిక్ అవుట్పేషంట్ హాజరును నమోదు చేసిన గ్రామీణ మండలాలను గుర్తించండి, అదే సంవత్సరంలో నివేదిక హాజరుతో పట్టణ ప్రాంతాలు కూడా ఉన్న ఏ మండలాలను మినహాయించండి.

src: Identify the sub-districts that reported outpatient services in both rural and urban areas during the year 2021.
mt: 2021లో రుణ మరియు పట్టణ ప్రాంతాలలో రుగ్మత సేవలు నివేదించిన ఉప-జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: For the year 2021, show the Vitamin A (Dose 1) and Rotavirus (Dose 1) immunization figures for all rural sub-districts.
mt: 2021 సంవత్సరానికి, అన్ని గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాలకు విటమిన్ ఎ (డోస్ 1) మరియు రోటావైరస్ (డోస్ 1) టీకాల డేటాను చూపించండి.

src: Rank the rural sub-districts by their total Vitamin A first dose counts for 2021, also showing the average number of first Rotavirus vaccinations for each.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులోకి అనువదించండి:
2021లో మొత్తం విటమిన్ ఎ మొదటి డోస్ లెక్కల ఆధారంగా గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాలను ర్యాంక్ చేయండి, ప్రతి ఒక్కదానికి మొదటి రోటావైరస్ టీకాల సగటు సంఖ్యను కూడా చూపండి.

src: Provide a breakdown of the total Rotavirus 1 and Vitamin A Dose 1 counts by area type for the year 2021.
mt: మొత్తం రోటావైరస్ 1 మరియు విటమిన్ ఎ డోస్ 1 లెక్కలను 2021 సంవత్సరానికి ప్రాంతం రకం ప్రకారం వివరించండి.

src: Rank the sub-districts by the total number of first-dose Vitamin A supplements administered throughout the year 2021, starting with the highest.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021 సంవత్సరం పూర్తి సంవత్సరంలో మొదటి డోస్ విటమిన్ ఎ సప్లిమెంట్లు అందించిన మొత్తం సంఖ్యను బట్టి ఉపజిల్లాలను ర్యాంక్ చేయండి, అత్యధికంతో ప్రారంభించండి.

src: Rank the sub-districts by the total number of first-dose Vitamin A supplements administered during the year 2021, starting with the highest.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021 సంవత్సరంలో మొదటి డోస్ విటమిన్ ఎ సప్లిమెంట్ల మొత్తం సంఖ్యను బట్టి, ఉప-జిల్లాలను ర్యాంక్ చేయండి, అత్యధికంతో ప్రారంభించండి.

src: Which five rural sub-districts recorded the highest total number of Rotavirus dose 3 immunizations in 2021?
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021లో రోటావైరస్ డోస్ 3 టీకాల మొత్తం సంఖ్యలో అత్యధిక రికార్డును నమోదు చేసిన ఐదు గ్రామీణ ఉప జిల్లాలు ఏవి?

src: Which five rural sub-districts recorded the highest total number of Rotavirus 3 immunizations in 2021?
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021లో రోటావైరస్ 3 టీకాల మొత్తం సంఖ్యలో అత్యధిక రికార్డులు నమోదు చేసిన ఐదు గ్రామీణ మండలాలు ఏవి?

src: Which sub-districts reported at least one first dose of the Rotavirus vaccine but zero third doses during the year 2021?
mt: 2021 సంవత్సరంలో రోటావైరస్ వ్యాక్సిన్ యొక్క కనీసం ఒక మొదటి డోస్ నివేదించబడిన, కానీ మూడవ డోస్ సున్నా ఉన్న ఉప-జిల్లాలు ఏవి?

src: Which sub-districts recorded more than 500 doses of both Vitamin A (Dose 1) and Rotavirus (Dose 1) during the year 2022?
mt: 2022 సంవత్సరంలో విటమిన్ ఎ (డోస్ 1) మరియు రోటావైరస్ (డోస్ 1) రెండింటికీ 500 కంటే ఎక్కువ డోస్లు నమోదైన ఉపజిల్లాలు ఏవి?

src: Identify the sub-districts that, in 2021, reported either more than 15 Rotavirus 1 immunizations in rural areas or more than 1 Vitamin A first dose administrations in urban areas, listed alphabetically.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021లో, గ్రామీణ ప్రాంతాల్లో 15 కంటే ఎక్కువ రోటావైరస్ 1 టీకాలు లేదా పట్టణ ప్రాంతాల్లో 1 కంటే ఎక్కువ విటమిన్ ఎ మొదటి డోస్ నిర్వహణలు నివేదించిన ఉప-జిల్లాలను అక్షర క్రమంలో గుర్తించండి.

src: Provide the immunization IDs and counts for children over 10 years old who received TT10 or TD10 vaccines in rural areas during 2021, sorted by the number of children vaccinated.
mt: ఏకాంత ప్రాంతాలలో 2021లో TT10 లేదా TD10 టీకాలు పొందిన 10 సంవత్సరాల కంటే ఎక్కువ వయస్సు గల పిల్లల ఇమ్యునైజేషన్ ఐడీలు మరియు గణనలను, టీకా వేయబడిన పిల్లల సంఖ్య ప్రకారం క్రమబద్ధీకరించి అందించండి.

src: For the year 2021, provide the total count of children over 10 and 16 years old who received immunizations, broken down by sub-district and area type.
mt: 2021 సంవత్సరానికి, 10 మరియు 16 సంవత్సరాలకు మించిన పిల్లలకు ఇచ్చిన టీకాల మొత్తం సంఖ్యను, ఉపజిల్లా మరియు ప్రాంత రకం ప్రకారం వివరించండి.

src: Provide a breakdown of the total number of children over 10 and 16 years old who received immunizations in 2021, categorized by sub-district and area type.
mt: మొత్తం 10 మరియు 16 సంవత్సరాలకు మించిన పిల్లలు 2021లో టీకాలు పొందిన వివరణను, ఉపజిల్లా మరియు ప్రాంత రకం వారీగా విభజించి అందించండి.

src: Rank the sub-districts by the total number of children over 10 and 16 years old who received adolescent immunizations in 2021, excluding those with no records.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021లో 10 మరియు 16 సంవత్సరాలకు మించిన పిల్లలు అడోలెసెంట్ టీకాలు పొందిన మొత్తం సంఖ్యను బట్టి, రికార్డులు లేని వాటిని మినహాయించి, ఉపజిల్లాలను ర్యాంక్ చేయండి.

src: Which five rural sub-districts had the highest number of children over 10 years old receiving immunizations in 2021?
mt: 2021లో 10 సంవత్సరాలకు పైబడిన పిల్లలకు టీకాలు వేయించిన అత్యధిక సంఖ్య కలిగిన ఐదు గ్రామీణ మండలాలు ఏవి?

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than 34 children over the age of 10 received their first dose of the TT or TD vaccine during September 2020.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
సెప్టెంబర్ 2020లో 10 సంవత్సరాలకు పైగా వయస్సు ఉన్న 34 మందికి పైగా పిల్లలు తమ మొదటి డోస్ TT లేదా TD టీకాను పొందిన ఉపజిల్లలు మరియు వాటి ప్రాంత రకాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Identify the sub-districts that reported at least one child over five years old receiving the second DPT booster in 2021, specifically across both rural and urban areas.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021లో, గ్రామీణ మరియు పట్టణ ప్రాంతాలలో, ఐదు సంవత్సరాల కంటే ఎక్కువ వయస్సు గల కనీసం ఒక పిల్లవాడు రెండవ DPT బూస్టర్ పొందిన ఉపజిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Identify the sub-districts that recorded at least one child receiving the second DPT booster (DPT 5) in 2021 across both rural and urban areas.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021లో గ్రామీణ మరియు పట్టణ ప్రాంతాల్లో రెండవ DPT బూస్టర్ (DPT 5) పొందిన కనీసం ఒక పిల్లవాడు నమోదైన ఉప జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Identify the sub-districts that recorded at least one child receiving the second DPT booster (after age 5) in 2021 across both urban and rural areas, listed alphabetically.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021లో పట్టణ మరియు గ్రామీణ ప్రాంతాల్లో రెండవ DPT బూస్టర్ (5 సంవత్సరాల తర్వాత) పొందిన కనీసం ఒక బాలుని నమోదు చేసిన సబ్-డిస్ట్రిక్టులను, అక్షర క్రమంలో జాబితా చేయండి.

src: Identify the sub-districts that in 2021 either reported more than 34 children over age 10 receiving their TT10/TD10 immunization, or are urban areas with more than one child over age 16 receiving their TT16/TD16 dose.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021లో 10 సంవత్సరాలకు మించిన వయస్సు గల 34 మందికి పైగా పిల్లలు TT10/TD10 టీకాలు పొందిన ఉపజిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి, లేదా 16 సంవత్సరాలకు మించిన వయస్సు గల ఒకటి కంటే ఎక్కువ పిల్లలు TT16/TD16 టీకా మోతాదు పొందిన పట్టణ ప్రాంతాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: List the names and district IDs of all rural sub-districts.
mt: అన్ని గ్రామీణ ఉపజిల్లాల పేర్లు మరియు జిల్లా ఐడీలను జాబితా చేయండి.

src: Provide the IDs and names of all rural sub-districts, including their parent district IDs.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
అన్ని గ్రామీణ మండలాల IDలు మరియు పేర్లను, వాటి మాతృ జిల్లా IDలతో సహా అందించండి.

src: Provide a breakdown by area type of the total number of pregnant women registered for antenatal care and the average rate of women who received four or more checkups during 2021.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021లో ప్రసవపూర్వ సంరక్షణ కోసం నమోదు చేయబడిన మొత్తం గర్భిణీ స్త్రీల సంఖ్య మరియు నాలుగు లేదా అంతకంటే ఎక్కువ తనిఖీలు పొందిన స్త్రీల సగటు రేటును ప్రాంతం రకం ప్రకారం వివరణాత్మకంగా అందించండి.

src: Which rural sub-districts recorded at least one pregnant woman registering for antenatal care during the year 2021?
mt: 2021 సంవత్సరంలో కనీసం ఒక గర్భిణీ మహిళ ప్రసవపూర్వ సంరక్షణ కోసం నమోదు చేసుకున్న గ్రామీణ ఉపజిల్లాలు ఏవి?

src: List the rural sub-districts that had more than 10 pregnant women registered for antenatal care in 2021, ordered from highest to lowest registration count.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021లో ప్రసవపూర్వ సంరక్షణ కోసం 10 కంటే ఎక్కువ గర్భిణీ మహిళలు నమోదు చేయబడిన గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాలను, అత్యధిక నమోదు సంఖ్య నుండి తక్కువ వరకు క్రమబద్ధంగా జాబితా చేయండి.

src: Rank the urban sub-districts by the total number of pregnant women who received four or more antenatal care checkups during the year 2021, starting with the highest.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021 సంవత్సరంలో నాలుగు లేదా అంతకంటే ఎక్కువ ప్రసవపూర్వ సంరక్షణ తనిఖీలను పొందిన గర్భిణీ మహిళల మొత్తం సంఖ్య ఆధారంగా పట్టణ ఉపజిల్లాలను ర్యాంక్ చేయండి, అత్యధికంతో ప్రారంభించండి.

src: Rank the urban sub-districts by the total number of pregnant women who received four or more antenatal checkups during the year 2021, starting with the highest count.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021 సంవత్సరంలో నాలుగు లేదా అంతకంటే ఎక్కువ ప్రసవపూర్వ తనిఖీలు పొందిన గర్భిణీ మహిళల మొత్తం సంఖ్య ఆధారంగా, అత్యధిక గణనతో ప్రారంభించి, పట్టణ ఉపజిల్లాలను ర్యాంక్ చేయండి.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than 500 women registered for antenatal care within their first trimester during the year 2021.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021 సంవత్సరంలో, 500 మందికి పైగా గర్భిణీ మహిళలు తమ మొదటి త్రైమాసికంలో ప్రసవపూర్వ సంరక్షణ కోసం నమోదు చేసుకున్న ఉపజిల్లాలు మరియు వాటి ప్రాంతాల రకాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than five antenatal care registrations were recorded within the first trimester during the year 2021.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021 సంవత్సరంలో మొదటి త్రైమాసికంలో ఐదు కంటే ఎక్కువ ప్రసవపూర్వ సంరక్షణ నమోదులు నమోదైన ఉపజిల్లాలు మరియు వాటి ప్రాంతాల రకాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than five antenatal care registrations were recorded within the first trimester during the year 2021.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021 సంవత్సరంలో మొదటి త్రైమాసికంలో ఐదు కంటే ఎక్కువ ప్రసవపూర్వ సంరక్షణ నమోదులు నమోదైన ఉపజిల్లాలు మరియు వాటి ప్రాంతాల రకాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Identify the rural sub-districts that had maternal ANC registrations in 2022 but did not record any in 2021.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2022లో తల్లిగా ANC నమోదు చేసుకున్న గ్రామీణ ఉప జిల్లాలను గుర్తించంగా, కానీ 2021లో ఏవీ రికార్డ్ చేయబడలేదు.

src: List the names of rural sub-districts, in alphabetical order, where more than 5,000 pregnant women have registered for antenatal care.
mt: గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాల పేర్లను అక్షర క్రమంలో జాబితా చేయండి, ఇక్కడ 5,000 కంటే ఎక్కువ గర్భిణీ స్త్రీలు ప్రసవపూర్వ సంరక్షణ కోసం నమోదు చేసుకున్నారు.

src: Identify all rural sub-districts as well as any sub-districts that recorded more than 5,000 antenatal care registrations in a single month.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
అన్ని గ్రామీణ ఉప జిల్లాలను, అలాగే ఏ ఉప జిల్లాలు ఒకే నెలలో 5,000 కంటే ఎక్కువ ప్రసవపూర్వ సంరక్షణ నమోదులను నమోదు చేసాయో గుర్తించండి.

src: For the year 2021, provide a breakdown by area type showing the total number of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 and the average number of hemoglobin tests conducted.
mt: 2021 సంవత్సరానికి, హిమోగ్లోబిన్ స్థాయి 11 కంటే తక్కువ ఉన్న గర్భిణీ స్త్రీల మొత్తం సంఖ్య మరియు నిర్వహించబడిన హిమోగ్లోబిన్ పరీక్షల సగటు సంఖ్యను ప్రాంత రకం ప్రకారం వివరణాత్మకంగా అందించండి.

src: For the year 2021, provide a breakdown by area type of the total number of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 and the average number of hemoglobin tests conducted, specifically for areas where the count of low-hemoglobin cases is under 38, sorted by the total cases in descending order.
mt: 2021 సంవత్సరానికి, హిమోగ్లోబిన్ స్థాయి 11 కంటే తక్కువ ఉన్న గర్భిణీ మహిళల మొత్తం సంఖ్య మరియు నిర్వహించబడిన హిమోగ్లోబిన్ పరీక్షల సగటు సంఖ్యను ప్రాంత రకం ప్రకారం వివరించండి, ప్రత్యేకంగా తక్కువ-హిమోగ్లోబిన్ కేసుల సంఖ్య 38 కంటే తక్కువ ఉన్న ప్రాంతాల కోసం, మొత్తం కేసుల ఆధారంగా అవరోహణ క్రమంలో క్రమబద్ధీకరించండి.

src: Which rural sub-districts reported more than 500 cases of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 during the year 2021?
mt: 2021 సంవత్సరంలో హిమోగ్లోబిన్ స్థాయి 11 కంటే తక్కువ ఉన్న గర్భిణీ మహిళల కేసులు 500 కంటే ఎక్కువగా నమోదైన గ్రామీణ ఉపజిల్లాలు ఏవి?

src: Which rural sub-districts reported more than 500 pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 in the year 2021?
mt: 2021 సంవత్సరంలో హిమోగ్లోబిన్ స్థాయి 11 కంటే తక్కువ ఉన్న 500 కంటే ఎక్కువ గర్భిణీ మహిళలు ఎన్ని గ్రామీణ ఉపజిల్లాల్లో నమోదయ్యాయి?

src: Provide a breakdown of sub-districts and their area types, showing the total count of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 for the first year, focusing only on records where the count is less than 38 and ranking the results from highest to lowest.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
ఉప-జిల్లాల విభజన మరియు వాటి ప్రాంతాల రకాలను వివరించండి, మొదటి సంవత్సరంలో హిమోగ్లోబిన్ స్థాయి 11 కంటే తక్కువ ఉన్న గర్భిణీ స్త్రీల మొత్తం సంఖ్యను చూపండి, మరియు సంఖ్య 38 కంటే తక్కువ ఉన్న రికార్డులపై మాత్రమే దృష్టి పెట్టి, ఫలితాలను అత్యధికం నుండి అత్యల్పం వరకు ర్యాంక్ చేయండి.

src: Identify the top 5 rural sub-districts with the highest number of pregnant women recorded with hemoglobin levels below 11 in 2021.
mt: 2021లో హిమోగ్లోబిన్ స్థాయి 11 కంటే తక్కువ ఉన్న గర్భిణీ మహిళల సంఖ్య ఎక్కువగా నమోదైన అగ్ర 5 గ్రామీణ మండలాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where fewer than 38 pregnant women had hemoglobin levels below 11 in September 2020, excluding areas with no recorded cases.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
సెప్టెంబర్ 2020లో 11 కంటే తక్కువ హిమోగ్లోబిన్ స్థాయిలు కలిగిన 38 కంటే తక్కువ గర్భిణీ మహిళలు ఉన్న ఉపజిల్లాలు మరియు వాటి ప్రాంతాల రకాలను గుర్తించండి, నమోదు చేయబడిన కేసులు లేని ప్రాంతాలను మినహాయించండి.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than five pregnant women were recorded with hemoglobin levels below 11 during September 2020.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
సెప్టెంబర్ 2020లో ఐదు కంటే ఎక్కువ గర్భిణీ మహిళలు హిమోగ్లోబిన్ స్థాయి 11 కంటే తక్కువగా నమోదైన ఉపజిల్లలు మరియు వాటి ప్రాంతాల రకాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Which sub-districts reported cases of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 in rural areas but had no such cases in urban areas during the year 2021?
mt: 2021 సంవత్సరంలో గ్రామీణ ప్రాంతాలలో హిమోగ్లోబిన్ స్థాయి 11 కంటే తక్కువ ఉన్న గర్భిణీ మహిళల కేసులు నమోదైన, కానీ పట్టణ ప్రాంతాలలో అటువంటి కేసులు లేని ఉపజిల్లాలు ఏవి?

src: Identify the sub-districts that are either classified as rural areas or have reported more than 38 pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులోకి అనువదించండి:
గ్రామీణ ప్రాంతాలుగా వర్గీకరించబడిన లేదా 11 కంటే తక్కువ హీమోగ్లోబిన్ స్థాయిలతో 38 కంటే ఎక్కువ గర్భిణీ మహిళలు నమోదైన ఉప-జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Identify all rural sub-districts, specifically highlighting those where more than 500 pregnant women were recorded with hemoglobin levels below 11.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులోకి అనువదించండి:
అన్ని గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి, ముఖ్యంగా 500 కంటే ఎక్కువ గర్భిణీ స్త్రీలలో హిమోగ్లోబిన్ స్థాయి 11 కంటే తక్కువగా నమోదైన వాటిని ప్రత్యేకంగా హైలైట్ చేయండి.

src: Provide an alphabetical list of rural sub-districts along with their associated district IDs.
mt: గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాలను వాటి సంబంధిత జిల్లా ఐడీలతో కలిపి అక్షర క్రమంలో జాబితా చేయండి.

src: Provide a breakdown of the total oral pill cycles and condoms distributed in 2021, categorized by the type of area.
mt: మొత్తం ఓరల్ పిల్ చక్రాలు మరియు 2021లో పంపిణీ చేయబడిన కాండోమ్ల వివరణను, ప్రాంతం రకాన్ని బట్టి వర్గీకరించి అందించండి.

src: Provide a breakdown of oral pill cycles and condoms distributed in 2021 by area type, ranked by the volume of pill distribution for areas with active distribution.
mt: 2021లో క్రియాశీల పంపిణీ ఉన్న ప్రాంతాల కోసం, గుళికల పంపిణీ పరిమాణం ఆధారంగా ర్యాంక్ చేయబడిన ప్రాంతాల రకం ద్వారా, నోటి గుళికల చక్రాలు మరియు పంపిణీ చేయబడిన కాండోమ్ల వివరణను అందించండి.

src: List the rural sub-districts that have distributed more than 5,000 condoms, ranked from highest to lowest distribution volume.
mt: ఐదు వేల కండోమ్ల కంటే ఎక్కువ పంపిణీ చేసిన గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాలను, అత్యధికం నుండి తక్కువ పంపిణీ పరిమాణం ప్రకారం ర్యాంక్ చేసి జాబితా చేయండి.

src: Identify the top 5 rural sub-districts that distributed the highest number of combined oral pill cycles throughout the year 2021.
mt: 2021 సంవత్సరంలో అత్యధిక సంఖ్యలో కలిపిన ఓరల్ పిల్ చక్రాలను పంపిణీ చేసిన అగ్ర 5 గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Identify the top 5 rural sub-districts that distributed the highest total number of combined oral pill cycles throughout the year 2021.
mt: 2021 సంవత్సరంలో అత్యధిక మొత్తం కలిపిన ఓరల్ పిల్ చక్రాలను పంపిణీ చేసిన అగ్ర 5 గ్రామీణ ఉప-జిల్లాలను గుర్తించండి.

src: Provide a ranked list of sub-districts and their area types that distributed condoms in 2021, showing the total quantity provided for each.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2021లో కండోమ్లు పంపిణీ చేసిన ఉప-జిల్లాల మరియు వాటి ప్రాంతాల రకాల ర్యాంక్ జాబితాను అందించండి, ప్రతి ఒక్కటి కోసం అందించిన మొత్తం పరిమాణాన్ని చూపిస్తూ.

src: Which sub-districts distributed combined oral pill cycles but did not distribute any condoms during the year 2022?
mt: 2022 సంవత్సరంలో ఏ ఉప-జిల్లాలు కలిపి ముక్కల మాత్ర చక్రాలను పంపిణీ చేశాయి కానీ ఏ కాండోమ్లను పంపిణీ చేయలేదు?

src: Which sub-districts distributed combined oral pill cycles but did not distribute any condoms during the year 2022?
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
2022 సంవత్సరంలో ఏ ఉప-జిల్లాలు కలిపి ముక్కల మాత్ర చక్రాలను పంపిణీ చేశాయి కానీ కండోమ్లను ఏవీ పంపిణీ చేయలేదు?

src: List the sub-districts, in alphabetical order, that have distributed more than 5,000 oral pill cycles or over 10,000 condoms.
mt:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
అక్షర క్రమంలో, 5,000 కంటే ఎక్కువ నోటి గుళిక చక్రాలు లేదా 10,000 కంటే ఎక్కువ కాండోమ్లు పంపిణీ చేసిన ఉప జిల్లాలను జాబితా చేయండి.

src: List all the districts located in the state of Bihar.
mt: பீகார் மாநிலத்தில் அமைந்துள்ள அனைத்து மாவட்டங்களையும் பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: List all the districts in the state of Assam in alphabetical order.
mt: அசாம் மாநிலத்தில் உள்ள அனைத்து மாவட்டங்களையும் அகர வரிசையில் பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: Provide an alphabetized list of all districts located within the state of Bihar.
mt: பீகார் மாநிலத்தில் அமைந்துள்ள அனைத்து மாவட்டங்களின் அகரவரிசை பட்டியலை வழங்கவும்.

src: Provide a count of districts for each state, listed in alphabetical order by state name.
mt: ஒவ்வொரு மாநிலத்திற்கும் மாவட்டங்களின் எண்ணிக்கையை, மாநிலப் பெயரின் அகர வரிசைப்படி பட்டியலிடவும்.

src: List the names of districts in Assam that contain more than one rural sub-district, sorted alphabetically.
mt: அசாமில் ஒன்றுக்கு மேற்பட்ட கிராமிய துணை மாவட்டங்களைக் கொண்ட மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்களை அகர வரிசையில் பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: Provide a list of all districts, organized alphabetically by state and then by district name.
mt: மாநிலங்கள் மற்றும் மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்களின் அகரவரிசைப்படி அனைத்து மாவட்டங்களின் பட்டியலை வழங்கவும்.

src: List the names of the top five districts in Assam that contain more than one sub-district, sorted in reverse alphabetical order.
mt: அசாமில் ஒன்றுக்கு மேற்பட்ட துணை மாவட்டங்களைக் கொண்ட முதல் ஐந்து மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்களை, தலைகீழ் அகரவரிசையில் பட்டியலிடவும்.

src: List all districts in India along with the names of the states they belong to.
mt: இந்தியாவில் உள்ள அனைத்து மாவட்டங்களையும் அவை சேர்ந்த மாநிலங்களின் பெயர்களுடன் பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: Provide an alphabetized list of all districts in India, organized by their respective states.
mt: இந்தியாவின் அனைத்து மாவட்டங்களையும் அவற்றின் மாநிலங்களுக்கு ஏற்ப அகரவரிசையில் வழங்கவும்.

src: Identify the names of districts that are located in Assam but do not share a name with any district in Bihar.
mt: அசாமில் அமைந்துள்ள ஆனால் பீகாரில் எந்த மாவட்டத்தின் பெயருடனும் பொருந்தாத மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்களைக் கண்டறியவும்.

src: Identify the districts in Assam that do not share a name with any district in Bihar.
mt: அசாமில் உள்ள எந்த மாவட்டங்கள் பீகாரில் உள்ள எந்த மாவட்டத்துடனும் பெயர் பகிர்ந்து கொள்ளாதவை என்பதை அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: Confirm the name of the state of Assam from the list of states that have recorded district information.
mt: மாநிலங்களின் பட்டியலில் இருந்து அசாம் மாநிலத்தின் பெயரை உறுதிப்படுத்தவும்.

src: List all the districts located within the states of Assam and the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.
mt: அசாம் மற்றும் அந்தமான் மற்றும் நிக்கோபார் தீவுகள் மாநிலங்களில் அமைந்துள்ள அனைத்து மாவட்டங்களையும் பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: List the names of all states and their corresponding districts for the Andaman and Nicobar Islands or the Nicobars district, sorted alphabetically by state.
mt: அந்தமான் மற்றும் நிக்கோபார் தீவுகள் அல்லது நிக்கோபார் மாவட்டத்தின் அனைத்து மாநிலங்களின் பெயர்களையும் அவற்றின் தொடர்புடைய மாவட்டங்களையும் மாநிலத்தின் அகர வரிசைப்படி பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: Provide an alphabetical list of all rural sub-districts, including their names and IDs.
mt: அனைத்து கிராமிய துணை மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்கள் மற்றும் ஐடிகளுடன் அகர வரிசைப்படுத்தப்பட்ட பட்டியலை வழங்கவும்.

src: Provide a breakdown of the number of sub-districts by area type for each state, sorted alphabetically by state name and then by the highest count.
mt: மாநிலங்களின் பெயர்களின் அகரவரிசைப்படி, பின்னர் அதிக எண்ணிக்கையின் படி வரிசைப்படுத்தி, ஒவ்வொரு மாநிலத்திற்கும் பகுதி வகையின் அடிப்படையில் உள்ள துணை மாவட்டங்களின் எண்ணிக்கையின் விவரத்தை வழங்கவும்.

src: List the names of all rural sub-districts located in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.
mt: அந்தமான் நிக்கோபார் தீவுகளில் அமைந்துள்ள அனைத்து கிராமிய துணை மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்களை பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: List the names of all rural sub-districts located in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, sorted alphabetically.
mt: அந்தமான் மற்றும் நிக்கோபார் தீவுகளில் அமைந்துள்ள அனைத்து கிராமிய துணை மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்களை அகர வரிசையில் பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: List the sub-districts and their corresponding area types located within the state of Assam, sorted alphabetically by name.
mt: அசாம் மாநிலத்தில் அமைந்துள்ள துணை மாவட்டங்கள் மற்றும் அவற்றின் தொடர்புடைய பகுதி வகைகளை பெயரின் அகர வரிசையில் பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: List the names and area types of all sub-districts located within the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, sorted alphabetically by area type and name.
mt: அந்தமான் மற்றும் நிக்கோபார் தீவுகளில் அமைந்துள்ள அனைத்து துணை மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்கள் மற்றும் பகுதி வகைகளை, பகுதி வகை மற்றும் பெயரின் அகர வரிசைப்படி பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: Which five states have the highest number of rural sub-districts?
mt: எந்த ஐந்து மாநிலங்களில் அதிக எண்ணிக்கையிலான கிராமிய துணை மாவட்டங்கள் உள்ளன?

src: List the names of all rural sub-districts along with their corresponding district and state.
mt: அனைத்து கிராமிய துணை மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்களையும், அவற்றுடன் தொடர்புடைய மாவட்டம் மற்றும் மாநிலத்தையும் பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: Identify the sub-districts that are classified exclusively as urban areas and have no rural components.
mt: நகர்ப்புறப் பகுதிகளாக மட்டுமே வகைப்படுத்தப்பட்டு, கிராமப்புறக் கூறுகள் எதுவும் இல்லாத துணை மாவட்டங்களை அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: List the names of all sub-districts that are classified exclusively as urban areas, sorted alphabetically.
mt: நகர்ப்புறப் பகுதிகளாக மட்டுமே வகைப்படுத்தப்பட்ட அனைத்து துணை மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்களை அகரவரிசையில் பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: Provide a list containing the name 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' along with the names of all rural sub-districts.
mt: 'அந்தமான் மற்றும் நிக்கோபார் தீவுகள்' என்ற பெயரை உள்ளடக்கிய பட்டியலை, அனைத்து கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்களுடன் வழங்கவும்.

src: Show the allopathic outpatient attendance figures for the month of September 2020.
mt: செப்டம்பர் 2020 மாதத்திற்கான அனைத்து வகையான மருத்துவமனை வெளிநோயாளர் வருகை புள்ளிவிவரங்களைக் காட்டு.

src: List the outpatient IDs and their corresponding allopathic attendance counts for December 2022, focusing only on those with recorded visits, sorted from highest to lowest attendance.
mt: டிசம்பர் 2022-ல் பதிவுசெய்யப்பட்ட வருகைகளை மட்டும் கவனத்தில் கொண்டு, அனைத்து மருத்துவ வருகை எண்ணிக்கைகளுடன் அவற்றுடன் தொடர்புடைய புறநிலை நோயாளி ஐடிகளை பட்டியலிடுங்கள், மேலும் மிக உயர்ந்த முதல் குறைந்த வருகை வரிசையில் வரிசைப்படுத்துங்கள்.

src: Provide a yearly breakdown of the total allopathic outpatient attendance, ordered chronologically.
mt: மொத்த அலோபதி வெளிநோயாளர் வருகையின் ஆண்டு வாரியான பிரிவினையை காலவரிசைப்படி வரிசைப்படுத்தி வழங்கவும்.

src: Rank the months of 2022 by their total allopathic outpatient attendance, from highest to lowest.
mt: 2022 ஆம் ஆண்டின் மாதங்களை அவற்றின் மொத்த அலோபதி வெளிநோயாளர் வருகை அடிப்படையில், அதிகபட்சத்திலிருந்து குறைந்தபட்சம் வரை வரிசைப்படுத்துங்கள்.

src: Rank the months of 2022 from highest to lowest based on the total number of allopathic outpatient visits.
mt: 2022 ஆம் ஆண்டின் மாதங்களை அனைத்து மருத்துவ வெளிநோயாளர் பார்வைகளின் மொத்த எண்ணிக்கையின் அடிப்படையில் அதிகமானதிலிருந்து குறைவானதாக வரிசைப்படுத்துங்கள்.

src: Provide a monthly breakdown of total allopathic outpatient attendance for the year 2022, ranked from highest to lowest volume.
mt: 2022 ஆம் ஆண்டிற்கான மொத்த அலோபதி வெளிநோயாளர் வருகையை மாதாந்திரமாக உயர் முதல் குறைந்த அளவு வரிசையில் வழங்கவும்.

src: Identify the sub-districts that recorded allopathic outpatient attendance in 2022 but had no such attendance reported in 2021.
mt:
இந்த வினவலை மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
2022-ல் அனைத்து மருத்துவமுறை வெளிப்புற நோயாளி வருகை பதிவு செய்த, ஆனால் 2021-ல் அத்தகைய வருகை பதிவாகாத துணை மாவட்டங்களை அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: Identify the sub-districts that recorded allopathic outpatient attendance in 2022 but had no such attendance in 2021.
mt:
இந்த வினவலைத் தமிழில் மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
2022-ல் அனைத்து மருத்துவமுறை வெளிநோயாளர் வருகையைப் பதிவு செய்த, ஆனால் 2021-ல் அத்தகைய வருகை எதுவும் இல்லாத துணை மாவட்டங்களை அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: Which sub-districts recorded outpatient services in both 2021 and 2022?
mt: எந்த துணை மாவட்டங்கள் 2021 மற்றும் 2022 ஆம் ஆண்டுகளில் வெளிநோயாளர் சேவைகளை பதிவு செய்தன?

src: Identify the months that either belong to the year 2022 or recorded more than 5,000 allopathic outpatient visits, sorted alphabetically.
mt: 2022 ஆம் ஆண்டைச் சேர்ந்த அல்லது 5,000 க்கும் மேற்பட்ட அனைத்து மருத்துவமுறை வெளிநோயாளர் வருகைகளைப் பதிவு செய்த மாதங்களை அடையாளம் காணவும், அகர வரிசையில் வரிசைப்படுத்தவும்.

src: Provide the annual total for allopathic outpatient attendance across all recorded years.
mt: பதிவு செய்யப்பட்ட அனைத்து ஆண்டுகளுக்கும் அனைத்து மருத்துவமனைகளின் அலோபதி வெளிநோயாளர் வருகை மொத்தத்தை வருடாந்திர அடிப்படையில் வழங்கவும்.

src: Provide a yearly breakdown of total allopathic outpatient attendance across both rural and urban areas, ordered chronologically.
mt: கிராமப்புற மற்றும் நகர்ப்புற பகுதிகளில் மொத்த அலோபதி வெளிநோயாளர் வருகையின் ஆண்டு வாரியான பிரிவினையை காலவரிசைப்படி வரிசைப்படுத்தித் தரவும்.

src: Which rural sub-districts recorded a total allopathic outpatient attendance of more than 5,000 during the year 2021?
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில், எந்த கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களில் மொத்த அலோபதி வெளிநோயாளர் வருகை 5,000 க்கும் அதிகமாக பதிவாகியுள்ளது?

src: Rank the sub-districts and their area types by the total number of allopathic outpatient visits recorded throughout 2021, starting with the highest attendance.
mt: துணை மாவட்டங்களையும் அவற்றின் பகுதி வகைகளையும் 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டு முழுவதும் பதிவுசெய்யப்பட்ட அனைத்து அலோபதி வெளிநோயாளர் வருகைகளின் மொத்த எண்ணிக்கையை அடிப்படையாகக் கொண்டு, மிக உயர்ந்த வருகையுடன் தொடங்கி வரிசைப்படுத்துங்கள்.

src: Rank the sub-districts and their area types by the total number of allopathic outpatient visits recorded throughout 2021, starting with the highest attendance.
mt: துணை மாவட்டங்களையும் அவற்றின் பகுதி வகைகளையும் 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டு முழுவதும் பதிவு செய்யப்பட்ட அனைத்து அலோபதி வெளிநோயாளர் வருகைகளின் மொத்த எண்ணிக்கையின்படி வரிசைப்படுத்துங்கள், அதிக வருகையுடன் தொடங்கி.

src: Which five rural sub-districts had the highest total allopathic outpatient attendance in 2021?
mt: 2021-ல் மொத்த அலோபதி வெளிநோயாளர் வருகையில் முதல் ஐந்து கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்கள் எவை?

src: Identify the top 5 rural sub-districts with the highest total allopathic outpatient attendance for the year 2021.
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் மொத்த அலோபதி வெளிநோயாளர் வருகையில் மிக உயர்ந்த முதல் 5 கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களை அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: Which five rural sub-districts recorded the highest total allopathic outpatient attendance during the year 2021?
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் மொத்த அலோபதி வெளிநோயாளர் வருகையில் மிக உயர்ந்த பதிவைக் கொண்ட ஐந்து கிராமிய துணை மாவட்டங்கள் எவை?

src: Rank the sub-districts and their area types by the total volume of allopathic outpatient attendance recorded throughout the year 2021, starting with the highest.
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டு முழுவதும் பதிவு செய்யப்பட்ட அனைத்து அலோபதி வெளிப்புற நோயாளி வருகைகளின் மொத்த அளவை அடிப்படையாகக் கொண்டு, துணை மாவட்டங்களையும் அவற்றின் பகுதி வகைகளையும் முதலிடத்தில் இருந்து வரிசைப்படுத்துங்கள்.

src: Identify the rural sub-districts that recorded allopathic outpatient attendance in 2022, excluding any sub-districts that also have urban areas with reported attendance for that same year.
mt: 2022-ல் அனைத்து மருந்துகளையும் கொண்டு வெளிப்புற நோயாளி வருகை பதிவு செய்யப்பட்ட கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களை அடையாளம் காணவும், அதே ஆண்டில் அறிக்கை செய்யப்பட்ட வருகை கொண்ட நகர்ப்புற பகுதிகளும் உள்ள துணை மாவட்டங்களை விலக்கவும்.

src: Identify the sub-districts that reported outpatient services in both rural and urban areas during the year 2021.
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் கிராமப்புற மற்றும் நகர்ப்புற பகுதிகளில் வெளிநோயாளர் சேவைகளைப் பதிவு செய்த துணை மாவட்டங்களை அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: For the year 2021, show the Vitamin A (Dose 1) and Rotavirus (Dose 1) immunization figures for all rural sub-districts.
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டுக்கான அனைத்து கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களுக்கான வைட்டமின் ஏ (முதல் டோஸ்) மற்றும் ரோட்டா வைரஸ் (முதல் டோஸ்) தடுப்பூசி புள்ளிவிவரங்களைக் காண்பிக்கவும்.

src: Rank the rural sub-districts by their total Vitamin A first dose counts for 2021, also showing the average number of first Rotavirus vaccinations for each.
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டிற்கான மொத்த வைட்டமின் ஏ முதல் டோஸ் எண்ணிக்கையின் அடிப்படையில் கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களை வரிசைப்படுத்துங்கள், மேலும் ஒவ்வொன்றிற்கும் முதல் ரோட்டா வைரஸ் தடுப்பூசிகளின் சராசரி எண்ணிக்கையையும் காண்பிக்கவும்.

src: Provide a breakdown of the total Rotavirus 1 and Vitamin A Dose 1 counts by area type for the year 2021.
mt: மொத்த ரோட்டா வைரஸ் 1 மற்றும் வைட்டமின் ஏ டோஸ் 1 எண்ணிக்கைகளை 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டிற்கான பகுதி வகை அடிப்படையில் பிரித்து வழங்கவும்.

src: Rank the sub-districts by the total number of first-dose Vitamin A supplements administered throughout the year 2021, starting with the highest.
mt: துணை மாவட்டங்களை 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டு முழுவதும் வழங்கப்பட்ட முதல் டோஸ் வைட்டமின் ஏ பூரிப்புகளின் மொத்த எண்ணிக்கையின்படி வரிசைப்படுத்துங்கள், மிக உயர்ந்த எண்ணிக்கையில் தொடங்கி.

src: Rank the sub-districts by the total number of first-dose Vitamin A supplements administered during the year 2021, starting with the highest.
mt: துணை மாவட்டங்களை 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் முதல் டோஸ் வைட்டமின் ஏ பூர்த்திகள் வழங்கப்பட்ட மொத்த எண்ணிக்கையின் அடிப்படையில் வரிசைப்படுத்துங்கள், மிக உயர்ந்த எண்ணிக்கையில் இருந்து தொடங்குங்கள்.

src: Which five rural sub-districts recorded the highest total number of Rotavirus dose 3 immunizations in 2021?
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் ரோட்டா வைரஸ் மூன்றாம் டோஸ் தடுப்பூசி அதிக அளவில் பதிவான ஐந்து கிராமிய துணை மாவட்டங்கள் எவை?

src: Which five rural sub-districts recorded the highest total number of Rotavirus 3 immunizations in 2021?
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் ரோட்டா வைரஸ் 3 தடுப்பூசியின் மொத்த எண்ணிக்கையில் மிக உயர்ந்த ஐந்து கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்கள் எவை?

src: Which sub-districts reported at least one first dose of the Rotavirus vaccine but zero third doses during the year 2021?
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் ரோட்டா வைரஸ் தடுப்பூசியின் குறைந்தபட்சம் ஒரு முதல் டோஸ் பதிவாகியுள்ள, ஆனால் மூன்றாவது டோஸ் பூஜ்ஜியமாக உள்ள துணை மாவட்டங்கள் எவை?

src: Which sub-districts recorded more than 500 doses of both Vitamin A (Dose 1) and Rotavirus (Dose 1) during the year 2022?
mt: 2022 ஆம் ஆண்டில், எந்த துணை மாவட்டங்கள் வைட்டமின் ஏ (முதல் டோஸ்) மற்றும் ரோட்டா வைரஸ் (முதல் டோஸ்) இரண்டிற்கும் 500 டோஸ்கள் மேல் பதிவு செய்தன?

src: Identify the sub-districts that, in 2021, reported either more than 15 Rotavirus 1 immunizations in rural areas or more than 1 Vitamin A first dose administrations in urban areas, listed alphabetically.
mt: 2021-ல், கிராமப்புறங்களில் 15க்கும் மேற்பட்ட ரோட்டா வைரஸ் 1 தடுப்பூசிகள் அல்லது நகர்ப்புறங்களில் 1க்கும் மேற்பட்ட வைட்டமின் ஏ முதல் டோஸ் நிர்வாகங்கள் செய்யப்பட்ட துணை மாவட்டங்களை அகரவரிசையில் பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: Provide the immunization IDs and counts for children over 10 years old who received TT10 or TD10 vaccines in rural areas during 2021, sorted by the number of children vaccinated.
mt: கிராமப்புறங்களில் 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் TT10 அல்லது TD10 தடுப்பூசிகளைப் பெற்ற 10 வயதுக்கு மேற்பட்ட குழந்தைகளுக்கான தடுப்பூசி ஐடிகள் மற்றும் எண்ணிக்கைகளை, தடுப்பூசி பெற்ற குழந்தைகளின் எண்ணிக்கையின்படி வரிசைப்படுத்தித் தரவும்.

src: For the year 2021, provide the total count of children over 10 and 16 years old who received immunizations, broken down by sub-district and area type.
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டுக்கான, துணை மாவட்டம் மற்றும் பகுதி வகையின்படி பிரிக்கப்பட்ட, 10 மற்றும் 16 வயதுக்கு மேற்பட்ட குழந்தைகளுக்கு வழங்கப்பட்ட தடுப்பூசிகளின் மொத்த எண்ணிக்கையை வழங்கவும்.

src: Provide a breakdown of the total number of children over 10 and 16 years old who received immunizations in 2021, categorized by sub-district and area type.
mt: மொத்தமாக 10 வயதுக்கு மேற்பட்ட மற்றும் 16 வயதுக்கு மேற்பட்ட குழந்தைகள் 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் துணை மாவட்டம் மற்றும் பகுதி வகைப்படி தடுப்பூசிகள் பெற்றவர்களின் எண்ணிக்கையை விவரமாக வழங்கவும்.

src: Rank the sub-districts by the total number of children over 10 and 16 years old who received adolescent immunizations in 2021, excluding those with no records.
mt: துணை மாவட்டங்களை 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் இளம்பருவ தடுப்பூசிகள் பெற்ற 10 மற்றும் 16 வயதுக்கு மேற்பட்ட மொத்த குழந்தைகளின் எண்ணிக்கையின்படி வரிசைப்படுத்துங்கள், பதிவுகள் இல்லாதவற்றைத் தவிர்த்து.

src: Which five rural sub-districts had the highest number of children over 10 years old receiving immunizations in 2021?
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில், 10 வயதுக்கு மேற்பட்ட குழந்தைகளுக்கு அதிக எண்ணிக்கையில் தடுப்பூசிகள் பெற்ற ஐந்து கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்கள் எவை?

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than 34 children over the age of 10 received their first dose of the TT or TD vaccine during September 2020.
mt:
இந்த வினவலைத் தமிழில் மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
செப்டம்பர் 2020-ல் 10 வயதுக்கு மேற்பட்ட 34 குழந்தைகளுக்கு முதல் டிடி அல்லது டிடி தடுப்பூசி கிடைத்த துணை மாவட்டங்களையும் அவற்றின் பகுதி வகைகளையும் அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: Identify the sub-districts that reported at least one child over five years old receiving the second DPT booster in 2021, specifically across both rural and urban areas.
mt:
இந்த வினாவை மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில், குறைந்தது ஒரு குழந்தைக்கு ஐந்து வயதுக்கு மேற்பட்ட குழந்தைகள் இரண்டாவது டிபிடி பூஸ்டர் பெற்றதாக அறிவிக்கப்பட்ட துணை மாவட்டங்களை அடையாளம் காணவும், குறிப்பாக கிராமப்புற மற்றும் நகர்ப்புற பகுதிகள் முழுவதும்.

src: Identify the sub-districts that recorded at least one child receiving the second DPT booster (DPT 5) in 2021 across both rural and urban areas.
mt:
இந்த வினவலைத் தமிழில் மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் கிராமப்புற மற்றும் நகர்ப்புற பகுதிகள் இரண்டிலும் குறைந்தது ஒரு குழந்தை இரண்டாவது டிபிடி பூஸ்டர் (டிபிடி 5) பெற்றதாக பதிவு செய்யப்பட்ட துணை மாவட்டங்களை அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: Identify the sub-districts that recorded at least one child receiving the second DPT booster (after age 5) in 2021 across both urban and rural areas, listed alphabetically.
mt:
இந்த வினவலைத் தமிழில் மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் நகர்ப்புற மற்றும் கிராமப்புற பகுதிகளில் இரண்டாவது டிபிடி பூஸ்டர் (5 வயதுக்குப் பிறகு) பெற்ற குறைந்தது ஒரு குழந்தையைப் பதிவு செய்த துணை மாவட்டங்களை அகர வரிசையில் பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: Identify the sub-districts that in 2021 either reported more than 34 children over age 10 receiving their TT10/TD10 immunization, or are urban areas with more than one child over age 16 receiving their TT16/TD16 dose.
mt:
இந்த வினவலைத் தமிழில் மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில், 10 வயதுக்கு மேற்பட்ட 34 குழந்தைகளுக்கு மேல் TT10/TD10 தடுப்பூசி பெற்றுள்ள துணை மாவட்டங்களை அல்லது 16 வயதுக்கு மேற்பட்ட ஒன்றுக்கு மேற்பட்ட குழந்தைகள் TT16/TD16 டோஸ் பெற்றுள்ள நகர்ப்புற பகுதிகளை அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: List the names and district IDs of all rural sub-districts.
mt: அனைத்து கிராமிய துணை மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்கள் மற்றும் மாவட்ட ஐடிகளை பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: Provide the IDs and names of all rural sub-districts, including their parent district IDs.
mt: அனைத்து கிராமிய துணை மாவட்டங்களின் ஐடிகள் மற்றும் பெயர்களை, அவற்றின் பெற்றோர் மாவட்ட ஐடிகளுடன் வழங்கவும்.

src: Provide a breakdown by area type of the total number of pregnant women registered for antenatal care and the average rate of women who received four or more checkups during 2021.
mt: கருப்பிணிப் பெண்களின் மொத்த பதிவு எண்ணிக்கை மற்றும் 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் நான்கு அல்லது அதற்கு மேற்பட்ட சோதனைகள் பெற்ற பெண்களின் சராசரி விகிதத்தை பகுதி வகை வாரியாக பிரித்து வழங்கவும்.

src: Which rural sub-districts recorded at least one pregnant woman registering for antenatal care during the year 2021?
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் குறைந்தது ஒரு கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்ணாவது கர்ப்பகால பராமரிப்புக்காக பதிவு செய்துள்ள ஊரக துணை மாவட்டங்கள் எவை?

src: List the rural sub-districts that had more than 10 pregnant women registered for antenatal care in 2021, ordered from highest to lowest registration count.
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் 10 க்கும் மேற்பட்ட கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்கள் முன்கூட்டிய கருத்தரிப்பு பராமரிப்புக்காக பதிவு செய்துள்ள ஊரக துணை மாவட்டங்களை, பதிவு எண்ணிக்கையின் அடிப்படையில் அதிகபட்சத்திலிருந்து குறைந்தபட்சமாக வரிசைப்படுத்தி பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: Rank the urban sub-districts by the total number of pregnant women who received four or more antenatal care checkups during the year 2021, starting with the highest.
mt: நகர்ப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களை 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் நான்கு அல்லது அதற்கு மேற்பட்ட கர்ப்ப கால பரிசோதனைகளைப் பெற்ற மொத்த கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்களின் எண்ணிக்கையைக் கொண்டு, அதிக எண்ணிக்கையில் தொடங்கி வரிசைப்படுத்துங்கள்.

src: Rank the urban sub-districts by the total number of pregnant women who received four or more antenatal checkups during the year 2021, starting with the highest count.
mt: நகர்ப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களை 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் நான்கு அல்லது அதற்கு மேற்பட்ட கர்ப்ப கால பரிசோதனைகளைப் பெற்ற கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்களின் மொத்த எண்ணிக்கையின் அடிப்படையில், அதிக எண்ணிக்கையில் தொடங்கி வரிசைப்படுத்தவும்.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than 500 women registered for antenatal care within their first trimester during the year 2021.
mt:
இந்த வினவலைத் தமிழில் மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில், 500 க்கும் மேற்பட்ட பெண்கள் தங்கள் முதல் மூன்று மாதங்களில் கர்ப்பகால பராமரிப்புக்காக பதிவு செய்த துணை மாவட்டங்களையும் அவற்றின் பகுதி வகைகளையும் அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than five antenatal care registrations were recorded within the first trimester during the year 2021.
mt:
இந்த வினவலைத் தமிழில் மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் முதல் மூன்று மாதங்களுக்குள் ஐந்துக்கும் மேற்பட்ட கர்ப்பகாலப் பராமரிப்புப் பதிவுகள் பதிவு செய்யப்பட்ட துணை மாவட்டங்களையும் அவற்றின் பகுதி வகைகளையும் அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than five antenatal care registrations were recorded within the first trimester during the year 2021.
mt:
இந்த வினவலை மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் முதல் மூன்று மாதங்களுக்குள் ஐந்துக்கும் மேற்பட்ட கர்ப்ப கால பராமரிப்பு பதிவுகள் பதிவு செய்யப்பட்ட துணை மாவட்டங்கள் மற்றும் அவற்றின் பரப்பளவு வகைகளை அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: Identify the rural sub-districts that had maternal ANC registrations in 2022 but did not record any in 2021.
mt: 2021-ல் எந்தப் பதிவுகளும் இல்லாமல், 2022-ல் தாய்வழி ANC பதிவுகளைக் கொண்ட கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களைக் கண்டறியவும்.

src: List the names of rural sub-districts, in alphabetical order, where more than 5,000 pregnant women have registered for antenatal care.
mt: கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களின் பெயர்களை அகரவரிசையில் பட்டியலிடுங்கள், அங்கு 5,000 க்கும் மேற்பட்ட கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்கள் முன்கூட்டிய கர்ப்ப பராமரிப்பிற்காக பதிவு செய்துள்ளனர்.

src: Identify all rural sub-districts as well as any sub-districts that recorded more than 5,000 antenatal care registrations in a single month.
mt:
இந்த வினவலைத் தமிழில் மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
அனைத்து கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களையும், மேலும் ஒரு மாதத்தில் 5,000 க்கும் மேற்பட்ட மகப்பேறு முன் பராமரிப்பு பதிவுகளைப் பதிவு செய்த எந்த துணை மாவட்டங்களையும் அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: For the year 2021, provide a breakdown by area type showing the total number of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 and the average number of hemoglobin tests conducted.
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டுக்கான, குருதிச்சிவப்பு அளவு 11 க்கும் குறைவாக உள்ள கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்களின் மொத்த எண்ணிக்கையையும், மேற்கொள்ளப்பட்ட குருதிச்சிவப்பு சோதனைகளின் சராசரி எண்ணிக்கையையும் பகுதி வகையின்படி பிரித்துக் காட்டவும்.

src: For the year 2021, provide a breakdown by area type of the total number of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 and the average number of hemoglobin tests conducted, specifically for areas where the count of low-hemoglobin cases is under 38, sorted by the total cases in descending order.
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டிற்கான, குறைந்த ஹீமோகுளோபின் நிலைகள் 11 க்கும் கீழ் உள்ள கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்களின் மொத்த எண்ணிக்கை மற்றும் ஹீமோகுளோபின் பரிசோதனைகளின் சராசரி எண்ணிக்கையை பகுதி வகை வாரியாக விவரிக்கவும். குறிப்பாக, குறைந்த ஹீமோகுளோபின் வழக்குகளின் எண்ணிக்கை 38 க்கும் குறைவாக உள்ள பகுதிகளுக்கு, மொத்த வழக்குகளின் அடிப்படையில் இறங்கு வரிசையில் வரிசைப்படுத்தவும்.

src: Which rural sub-districts reported more than 500 cases of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 during the year 2021?
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில், 11 க்கும் குறைவான ஹீமோகுளோபின் அளவைக் கொண்ட கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்களின் வழக்குகள் 500 க்கும் மேலாக எந்த கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்கள் பதிவு செய்தன?

src: Which rural sub-districts reported more than 500 pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 in the year 2021?
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் 11 க்கும் குறைவான ஹீமோகுளோபின் அளவைக் கொண்ட 500 க்கும் மேற்பட்ட கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்களைப் பதிவு செய்துள்ள ஊரக துணை மாவட்டங்கள் எவை?

src: Provide a breakdown of sub-districts and their area types, showing the total count of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 for the first year, focusing only on records where the count is less than 38 and ranking the results from highest to lowest.
mt:
இந்த வினவலை மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
துணை மாவட்டங்கள் மற்றும் அவற்றின் பகுதி வகைகளின் விவரங்களை வழங்கவும், முதல் ஆண்டுக்கான 11 க்கும் குறைவான ஹீமோகுளோபின் அளவைக் கொண்ட கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்களின் மொத்த எண்ணிக்கையைக் காட்டவும், எண்ணிக்கை 38 க்கும் குறைவாக உள்ள பதிவுகளில் மட்டுமே கவனம் செலுத்தவும் மற்றும் முடிவுகளை மிக உயர்ந்ததிலிருந்து மிகக் குறைந்த வரை வரிசைப்படுத்தவும்.

src: Identify the top 5 rural sub-districts with the highest number of pregnant women recorded with hemoglobin levels below 11 in 2021.
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் 11 க்கும் குறைவான ஹீமோகுளோபின் அளவு பதிவு செய்யப்பட்ட கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்களின் எண்ணிக்கை அதிகமாக உள்ள முதல் 5 கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களை அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where fewer than 38 pregnant women had hemoglobin levels below 11 in September 2020, excluding areas with no recorded cases.
mt:
கீழ்க்கண்ட வினாவை மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
செப்டம்பர் 2020 இல் 11 க்கும் குறைவான ஹீமோகுளோபின் அளவு கொண்ட 38 க்கும் குறைவான கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்கள் உள்ள துணை மாவட்டங்களையும் அவற்றின் பகுதி வகைகளையும் அடையாளம் காணவும், பதிவு செய்யப்பட்ட வழக்குகள் இல்லாத பகுதிகளைத் தவிர்த்து.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than five pregnant women were recorded with hemoglobin levels below 11 during September 2020.
mt:
இந்த வினவலைத் தமிழில் மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
செப்டம்பர் 2020 இல் ஐந்துக்கும் மேற்பட்ட கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்கள் 11 க்கும் குறைவான ஹீமோகுளோபின் அளவுகள் பதிவாகியுள்ள துணை மாவட்டங்களையும் அவற்றின் பகுதி வகைகளையும் கண்டறியவும்.

src: Which sub-districts reported cases of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 in rural areas but had no such cases in urban areas during the year 2021?
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில், கிராமப்புறங்களில் ஹீமோகுளோபின் அளவு 11 க்கும் குறைவாக உள்ள கர்ப்பிணி பெண்களின் நிகழ்வுகள் பதிவு செய்யப்பட்ட, ஆனால் நகர்புறங்களில் அத்தகைய நிகழ்வுகள் எதுவும் இல்லாத துணை மாவட்டங்கள் எவை?

src: Identify the sub-districts that are either classified as rural areas or have reported more than 38 pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11.
mt:
இந்த வினவலை மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
கிராமப்புறப் பகுதிகளாக வகைப்படுத்தப்பட்டுள்ள அல்லது 11 க்கும் குறைவான ஹீமோகுளோபின் அளவைக் கொண்ட 38 க்கும் மேற்பட்ட கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்கள் பதிவாகியுள்ள துணை மாவட்டங்களை அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: Identify all rural sub-districts, specifically highlighting those where more than 500 pregnant women were recorded with hemoglobin levels below 11.
mt:
இந்த வினவலை மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
அனைத்து கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களை அடையாளம் காணவும், குறிப்பாக 500 க்கும் மேற்பட்ட கர்ப்பிணிப் பெண்கள் 11 க்கும் குறைவான ஹீமோகுளோபின் அளவுகளுடன் பதிவு செய்யப்பட்ட துணை மாவட்டங்களை முன்னிலைப்படுத்தவும்.

src: Provide an alphabetical list of rural sub-districts along with their associated district IDs.
mt: கிராமிய துணை மாவட்டங்களின் அகர வரிசைப்பட்டியலை, அவற்றுடன் தொடர்புடைய மாவட்ட அடையாளங்களுடன் வழங்கவும்.

src: Provide a breakdown of the total oral pill cycles and condoms distributed in 2021, categorized by the type of area.
mt: மொத்த வாய்வழி மாத்திரை சுழற்சிகள் மற்றும் 2021 இல் விநியோகிக்கப்பட்ட காந்தோணிகளை, பகுதியின் வகையின்படி வகைப்படுத்தி வழங்கவும்.

src: Provide a breakdown of oral pill cycles and condoms distributed in 2021 by area type, ranked by the volume of pill distribution for areas with active distribution.
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் வாய்வழி மாத்திரை சுழற்சிகள் மற்றும் விநியோகிக்கப்பட்ட காந்தோம்களின் பிரிவினையை பகுதி வகை மூலம் வழங்கவும், மேலும் செயலில் உள்ள விநியோகம் உள்ள பகுதிகளுக்கு மாத்திரை விநியோக அளவின்படி தரவரிசைப்படுத்தவும்.

src: List the rural sub-districts that have distributed more than 5,000 condoms, ranked from highest to lowest distribution volume.
mt: 5,000 கண்டோம்களுக்கு மேல் விநியோகிக்கப்பட்டுள்ள கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களை, விநியோக அளவின் அடிப்படையில் உயர்ந்தது முதல் குறைந்தது வரை பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: Identify the top 5 rural sub-districts that distributed the highest number of combined oral pill cycles throughout the year 2021.
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டு முழுவதும் அதிக எண்ணிக்கையில் கூட்டு வாய்வழி மாத்திரை சுழற்சிகளை விநியோகித்த முதல் 5 கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களை அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: Identify the top 5 rural sub-districts that distributed the highest total number of combined oral pill cycles throughout the year 2021.
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டு முழுவதும் அதிக எண்ணிக்கையில் கூட்டு வாய்வழி மாத்திரை சுழற்சிகளை விநியோகித்த முதல் 5 கிராமப்புற துணை மாவட்டங்களை அடையாளம் காணவும்.

src: Provide a ranked list of sub-districts and their area types that distributed condoms in 2021, showing the total quantity provided for each.
mt: 2021 ஆம் ஆண்டில் கந்தரை விநியோகித்த துணை மாவட்டங்கள் மற்றும் அவற்றின் பகுதி வகைகளின் தரவரிசைப்பட்ட பட்டியலை வழங்கவும், ஒவ்வொன்றுக்கும் வழங்கப்பட்ட மொத்த அளவைக் காட்டவும்.

src: Which sub-districts distributed combined oral pill cycles but did not distribute any condoms during the year 2022?
mt: 2022 ஆம் ஆண்டில் கூட்டு வாய்வழி மாத்திரை சுழற்சிகளை விநியோகித்த ஆனால் கந்தோம்கள் எதையும் விநியோகிக்காத துணை மாவட்டங்கள் எவை?

src: Which sub-districts distributed combined oral pill cycles but did not distribute any condoms during the year 2022?
mt: 2022 ஆம் ஆண்டில் கூட்டு வாய்வழி மாத்திரை சுழற்சிகளை விநியோகித்த ஆனால் எந்த கண்டோம்களையும் விநியோகிக்காத துணை மாவட்டங்கள் எவை?

src: List the sub-districts, in alphabetical order, that have distributed more than 5,000 oral pill cycles or over 10,000 condoms.
mt:
இந்த வினவலைத் தமிழில் மொழிபெயர்க்கவும்:
அகர வரிசையில், 5,000 வாய்வழி மாத்திரை சுழற்சிகளுக்கு மேல் அல்லது 10,000 கந்தைத் தடுப்புகளுக்கு மேல் விநியோகித்த துணை மாவட்டங்களை பட்டியலிடுங்கள்.

src: List all the districts located in the state of Bihar.
mt: Bihar state mein sabhi districts ki list banao.

src: List all the districts in the state of Assam in alphabetical order.
mt: Assam state ke saare districts ko alphabetical order mein list karo.

src: Provide an alphabetized list of all districts located within the state of Bihar.
mt: Bihar state ke andar sabhi districts ki ek alphabetical list provide karo.

src: Provide a count of districts for each state, listed in alphabetical order by state name.
mt: Har state ke liye districts ki ginti pata karo, aur state ke naam ke hisaab se alphabetical order mein list karo.

src: List the names of districts in Assam that contain more than one rural sub-district, sorted alphabetically.
mt: Assam ke districts ke naam batao jisme ek se zyada rural sub-district ho, alphabetical order mein sort karke.

src: Provide a list of all districts, organized alphabetically by state and then by district name.
mt: Sabhi districts ki ek list provide karo, alphabetically organize karo state ke basis pe aur fir district name ke basis pe.

src: List the names of the top five districts in Assam that contain more than one sub-district, sorted in reverse alphabetical order.
mt: Assam ke top paanch districts ke naam batao jo ek se zyada sub-district rakhte hain, aur unhe reverse alphabetical order mein sort karo.

src: List all districts in India along with the names of the states they belong to.
mt: India ke saare districts list karo, aur unke state ke naam bhi batado.

src: Provide an alphabetized list of all districts in India, organized by their respective states.
mt: India ke sabhi districts ki ek alphabetized list provide karo, jo unke respective states ke basis par organize ho.

src: Identify the names of districts that are located in Assam but do not share a name with any district in Bihar.
mt: Assam mein aise districts ke naam batayein jo Bihar ke kisi bhi district ke naam se match nahi karte.

src: Identify the districts in Assam that do not share a name with any district in Bihar.
mt: Assam ke districts identify karo jo Bihar ke kisi bhi district ke naam se match nahi karte.

src: Confirm the name of the state of Assam from the list of states that have recorded district information.
mt: Assam state ka naam confirm karo, un states ki list se jinke paas district information record hai.

src: List all the districts located within the states of Assam and the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.
mt: Assam aur Andaman and Nicobar Islands ke states mein sabhi districts list karo.

src: List the names of all states and their corresponding districts for the Andaman and Nicobar Islands or the Nicobars district, sorted alphabetically by state.
mt: Andaman and Nicobar Islands ya Nicobars district ke liye, saare states ke names aur unke corresponding districts list karo, alphabetically state ke hisaab se sort karke.

src: Provide an alphabetical list of all rural sub-districts, including their names and IDs.
mt: Sare rural sub-districts ki ek alphabetical list banao, jismein unke names aur IDs shamil hon.

src: Provide a breakdown of the number of sub-districts by area type for each state, sorted alphabetically by state name and then by the highest count.
mt: Har state ke liye, area type ke hisaab se sub-districts ki sankhya ka breakdown do, state name ke alphabetical order mein sort karo aur phir highest count ke basis pe.

src: List the names of all rural sub-districts located in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.
mt: Andaman aur Nicobar Islands mein sabhi rural sub-districts ke naam list karo.

src: List the names of all rural sub-districts located in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, sorted alphabetically.
mt: Andaman aur Nicobar Islands mein sabhi rural sub-districts ke naam list karo, alphabetically sort karke.

src: List the sub-districts and their corresponding area types located within the state of Assam, sorted alphabetically by name.
mt: Assam state ke andar jo sub-districts hain, unke naam aur area types list karo, alphabetical order mein naam ke hisaab se sorted.

src: List the names and area types of all sub-districts located within the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, sorted alphabetically by area type and name.
mt: Andaman aur Nicobar Islands mein sab sub-districts ke names aur area types list karo, alphabetically sort karna area type aur name ke hisaab se.

src: Which five states have the highest number of rural sub-districts?
mt: Top 5 states kaun se hain jinke paas sabse zyada rural sub-districts hain?

src: List the names of all rural sub-districts along with their corresponding district and state.
mt: Sabhi gaon ke ilakon ke naam, unke sambandhit district aur state ke saath list karo.

src: Identify the sub-districts that are classified exclusively as urban areas and have no rural components.
mt: Sub-districts ko identify karo jo sirf urban areas ke category mein aate hain aur unme koi rural hissa nahi hai.

src: List the names of all sub-districts that are classified exclusively as urban areas, sorted alphabetically.
mt: Sub-districts ke saare naam list karo jo sirf urban areas mein classified hain, alphabetically sort karke.

src: Provide a list containing the name 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' along with the names of all rural sub-districts.
mt: Ek list banao jismein 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' ka naam ho, saath hi saare rural sub-districts ke names bhi hon.

src: Show the allopathic outpatient attendance figures for the month of September 2020.
mt: September 2020 ke allopathic outpatient attendance figures dikhao.

src: List the outpatient IDs and their corresponding allopathic attendance counts for December 2022, focusing only on those with recorded visits, sorted from highest to lowest attendance.
mt: December 2022 ke outpatient IDs aur unke allopathic attendance counts list karo, sirf recorded visits wale, aur attendance ke hisaab se highest se lowest sort karo.

src: Provide a yearly breakdown of the total allopathic outpatient attendance, ordered chronologically.
mt: Saal dar saal allopathic outpatient attendance ka breakdown do, chronological order mein.

src: Rank the months of 2022 by their total allopathic outpatient attendance, from highest to lowest.
mt: 2022 ke months ko unke total allopathic outpatient attendance ke hisaab se rank karo, highest se lowest tak.

src: Rank the months of 2022 from highest to lowest based on the total number of allopathic outpatient visits.
mt: 2022 ke months ko allopathic outpatient visits ke total number ke basis par highest se lowest tak rank karo.

src: Provide a monthly breakdown of total allopathic outpatient attendance for the year 2022, ranked from highest to lowest volume.
mt: 2022 ke saare allopathic outpatient attendance ka monthly breakdown do, highest se lowest volume ke order mein ranked.

src: Identify the sub-districts that recorded allopathic outpatient attendance in 2022 but had no such attendance reported in 2021.
mt: 2022 mein allopathic outpatient attendance wale sub-districts dhundho, lekin 2021 mein inka koi attendance report nahi hua ho.

src: Identify the sub-districts that recorded allopathic outpatient attendance in 2022 but had no such attendance in 2021.
mt: Woh sub-districts pata karo jahan 2022 mein allopathic outpatient attendance record hui thi, lekin 2021 mein aisi koi attendance nahi thi.

src: Which sub-districts recorded outpatient services in both 2021 and 2022?
mt: Kaunse sub-districts ne 2021 aur 2022 dono saal mein outpatient services record kiye the?

src: Identify the months that either belong to the year 2022 or recorded more than 5,000 allopathic outpatient visits, sorted alphabetically.
mt: 2022 ke saal wale mahino ya phir 5,000 se zyada allopathic outpatient visits record karne wale mahino ko pehchaan karo, aur unhe alphabetically sort karke dikhao.

src: Provide the annual total for allopathic outpatient attendance across all recorded years.
mt: Saare recorded saaloon mein allopathic outpatient attendance ka annual total batao.

src: Provide a yearly breakdown of total allopathic outpatient attendance across both rural and urban areas, ordered chronologically.
mt: Saal ke hisaab se, rural aur urban dono areas mein total allopathic outpatient attendance ka breakdown do, chronologically order karke.

src: Which rural sub-districts recorded a total allopathic outpatient attendance of more than 5,000 during the year 2021?
mt: Kaun se rural sub-districts ne saal 2021 mein 5,000 se zyada allopathic outpatient attendance record ki thi?

src: Rank the sub-districts and their area types by the total number of allopathic outpatient visits recorded throughout 2021, starting with the highest attendance.
mt: Sub-districts aur unke area types ko 2021 ke allopathic outpatient visits ke total number se rank karo, highest attendance se start karte hue.

src: Rank the sub-districts and their area types by the total number of allopathic outpatient visits recorded throughout 2021, starting with the highest attendance.
mt: Sub-districts aur unke area types ko 2021 ke saal bhar record kiye gaye allopathic outpatient visits ke total number ke hisaab se rank karo, highest attendance se shuru karte hue.

src: Which five rural sub-districts had the highest total allopathic outpatient attendance in 2021?
mt: 2021 mein top 5 rural sub-districts kaun se the jahan allopathic outpatient attendance sabse zyada tha?

src: Identify the top 5 rural sub-districts with the highest total allopathic outpatient attendance for the year 2021.
mt: Top 5 rural sub-districts ko identify karo jahan 2021 mein allopathic outpatient attendance ka total sabse zyada raha ho.

src: Which five rural sub-districts recorded the highest total allopathic outpatient attendance during the year 2021?
mt: Konsa paanch gaon ke ilaake ne saal 2021 mein sabse zyada allopathic outpatient attendance record kiya hai?

src: Rank the sub-districts and their area types by the total volume of allopathic outpatient attendance recorded throughout the year 2021, starting with the highest.
mt: Sub-districts aur unke area types ko 2021 ke pure saal mein record ki gayi allopathic outpatient attendance ke total volume ke hisaab se rank karo, highest se shuru karte hue.

src: Identify the rural sub-districts that recorded allopathic outpatient attendance in 2022, excluding any sub-districts that also have urban areas with reported attendance for that same year.
mt: Rural sub-districts ko identify karo jahan 2022 mein allopathic outpatient attendance record hui hai, lekin un sub-districts ko exclude karo jinke urban areas mein bhi usi saal reported attendance ho.

src: Identify the sub-districts that reported outpatient services in both rural and urban areas during the year 2021.
mt: Sub-districts ko identify karo jo 2021 mein rural aur urban dono areas mein outpatient services report kiye hain.

src: For the year 2021, show the Vitamin A (Dose 1) and Rotavirus (Dose 1) immunization figures for all rural sub-districts.
mt: 2021 ke liye, saare rural sub-districts ke Vitamin A (Dose 1) aur Rotavirus (Dose 1) immunization figures dikhao.

src: Rank the rural sub-districts by their total Vitamin A first dose counts for 2021, also showing the average number of first Rotavirus vaccinations for each.
mt: 2021 ke liye, Vitamin A ki pehli dose ke total count ke hisaab se rural sub-districts ko rank karo, aur saath hi har ek ka pehli Rotavirus vaccination ka average number bhi dikhao.

src: Provide a breakdown of the total Rotavirus 1 and Vitamin A Dose 1 counts by area type for the year 2021.
mt: 2021 ke liye, area type ke hisaab se total Rotavirus 1 aur Vitamin A Dose 1 ke counts ka breakdown do.

src: Rank the sub-districts by the total number of first-dose Vitamin A supplements administered throughout the year 2021, starting with the highest.
mt: Sub-districts ko 2021 ke pure saal mein diye gaye pehle dose Vitamin A supplements ki kul sankhya ke hisaab se rank karo, sabse zyada se shuru karte hue.

src: Rank the sub-districts by the total number of first-dose Vitamin A supplements administered during the year 2021, starting with the highest.
mt: Sub-districts ko ranking karo based on total number of first-dose Vitamin A supplements administered during 2021, highest se start karo.

src: Which five rural sub-districts recorded the highest total number of Rotavirus dose 3 immunizations in 2021?
mt: 2021 mein top 5 gaon ke ilaake kaun se hain jahan Rotavirus ki teesri dose ke sabse zyada teekikaran huye the?

src: Which five rural sub-districts recorded the highest total number of Rotavirus 3 immunizations in 2021?
mt: 2021 mein, kaunse paanch gaon ke sub-districts ne Rotavirus 3 immunization ka sabse zyada total number record kiya?

src: Which sub-districts reported at least one first dose of the Rotavirus vaccine but zero third doses during the year 2021?
mt: Kaun sub-districts mein 2021 ke saal mein Rotavirus vaccine ki ek first dose report hui thi, lekin third dose bilkul nahi?

src: Which sub-districts recorded more than 500 doses of both Vitamin A (Dose 1) and Rotavirus (Dose 1) during the year 2022?
mt: Konsi sub-districts mein 2022 ke dauraan Vitamin A (Dose 1) aur Rotavirus (Dose 1) dono ki 500 se zyada doses record hui thi?

src: Identify the sub-districts that, in 2021, reported either more than 15 Rotavirus 1 immunizations in rural areas or more than 1 Vitamin A first dose administrations in urban areas, listed alphabetically.
mt: 2021 mein, un sub-districts ko identify karo jo ya toh rural areas mein 15 se zyada Rotavirus 1 immunizations report kiye, ya phir urban areas mein 1 se zyada Vitamin A first dose administrations kiye, aur unhe alphabetically list karo.

src: Provide the immunization IDs and counts for children over 10 years old who received TT10 or TD10 vaccines in rural areas during 2021, sorted by the number of children vaccinated.
mt: Batao immunization IDs aur unki counts, jo 10 saal se zyada umar ke bachon ke liye hain, jinhe TT10 ya TD10 vaccines rural areas mein 2021 ke dauraan diye gaye, aur ise vaccinated bachon ki sankhya ke hisaab se sort karo.

src: For the year 2021, provide the total count of children over 10 and 16 years old who received immunizations, broken down by sub-district and area type.
mt: 2021 ke liye, sub-district aur area type ke hisaab se, 10 saal se zyada aur 16 saal se zyada umar ke bachchon ka total immunization count provide karo.

src: Provide a breakdown of the total number of children over 10 and 16 years old who received immunizations in 2021, categorized by sub-district and area type.
mt: Batao 2021 mein 10 saal se zyada aur 16 saal se zyada umar ke bachchon ki immunization ka total number, sub-district aur area type ke hisaab se.

src: Rank the sub-districts by the total number of children over 10 and 16 years old who received adolescent immunizations in 2021, excluding those with no records.
mt: Sub-districts ko rank karo, unke basis par 2021 mein 10 aur 16 saal se zyada umar ke bachchon ko mili adolescent immunizations ki total sankhya ke hisaab se, lekin jinme koi records nahi hai unhe chhod kar.

src: Which five rural sub-districts had the highest number of children over 10 years old receiving immunizations in 2021?
mt: Top 5 rural sub-districts kaun se hain jahan 2021 mein 10 saal se zyada umar ke bacchon ko sabse zyada immunization mila?

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than 34 children over the age of 10 received their first dose of the TT or TD vaccine during September 2020.
mt: Sub-districts aur unke area types pata karo jahan September 2020 mein 10 saal se zyada umar ke 34 se adhik bacchon ko TT ya TD vaccine ki pehli dose mili ho.

src: Identify the sub-districts that reported at least one child over five years old receiving the second DPT booster in 2021, specifically across both rural and urban areas.
mt: Un sub-districts ko pata karo jahan 2021 mein kam se kam ek bacha, jo 5 saal se zyada umar ka ho, ne doosra DPT booster liya ho, khaas taur par dono rural aur urban areas mein.

src: Identify the sub-districts that recorded at least one child receiving the second DPT booster (DPT 5) in 2021 across both rural and urban areas.
mt: Sub-districts ko identify karo jahan 2021 mein, dono rural aur urban areas mein, kam se kam ek bachche ko DPT ke second booster (DPT 5) mila ho.

src: Identify the sub-districts that recorded at least one child receiving the second DPT booster (after age 5) in 2021 across both urban and rural areas, listed alphabetically.
mt: Sub-districts ko identify karo jahan 2021 mein, urban aur rural dono areas mein, kam se kam ek bachche ne second DPT booster (5 saal ke baad) liya ho, aur unhe alphabetically list karo.

src: Identify the sub-districts that in 2021 either reported more than 34 children over age 10 receiving their TT10/TD10 immunization, or are urban areas with more than one child over age 16 receiving their TT16/TD16 dose.
mt: 2021 mein un sub-districts ko dhoondo jo ya toh 34 se zyada bachon (10 saal se bade) ko TT10/TD10 immunization diya ho, ya phir urban areas hain jahan ek se zyada bachon (16 saal se bade) ko TT16/TD16 dose mili ho.

src: List the names and district IDs of all rural sub-districts.
mt: Sare rural sub-districts ke names aur district IDs list karo.

src: Provide the IDs and names of all rural sub-districts, including their parent district IDs.
mt: Sabhi rural sub-districts ke IDs aur names, unke parent district IDs ke saath, provide karo.

src: Provide a breakdown by area type of the total number of pregnant women registered for antenatal care and the average rate of women who received four or more checkups during 2021.
mt: Area type ke hisaab se, 2021 mein antenatal care ke liye register hone wale pregnant women ki total sankhya aur chaar ya usse zyada checkups wale women ki average rate ka breakdown dijiye.

src: Which rural sub-districts recorded at least one pregnant woman registering for antenatal care during the year 2021?
mt: Kaunse rural sub-districts mein 2021 ke saal mein kam se kam ek pregnant woman ne antenatal care ke liye registration karaya tha?

src: List the rural sub-districts that had more than 10 pregnant women registered for antenatal care in 2021, ordered from highest to lowest registration count.
mt: Rural sub-districts ko list karo jahan 2021 mein antenatal care ke liye 10 se zyada pregnant women register hui thi, aur unhe highest se lowest registration count ke hisaab se order karo.

src: Rank the urban sub-districts by the total number of pregnant women who received four or more antenatal care checkups during the year 2021, starting with the highest.
mt: Urban sub-districts ko rank karo, jismein sabse zyada se shuru karte hue, 2021 ke saal mein chaar ya usse adhik antenatal care checkups paane wali pregnant women ki kul sankhya ke hisaab se.

src: Rank the urban sub-districts by the total number of pregnant women who received four or more antenatal checkups during the year 2021, starting with the highest count.
mt: Urban sub-districts ko rank karo, jismein 2021 mein char ya zyada antenatal checkups wali pregnant women ka total count sabse zyada se shuru karte hue.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than 500 women registered for antenatal care within their first trimester during the year 2021.
mt: Sub-districts aur unke area types pata karo jahan 2021 mein 500 se zyada mahilaon ne pehle trimester mein antenatal care ke liye registration karaya ho.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than five antenatal care registrations were recorded within the first trimester during the year 2021.
mt: Sub-districts aur unke area types pata karo jahan 2021 mein pehle trimester mein paanch se zyada antenatal care registrations record kiye gaye hain.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where more than five antenatal care registrations were recorded within the first trimester during the year 2021.
mt: Sub-districts aur unke area types pata karo jahan 2021 mein pehle trimester mein paanch se zyada antenatal care registrations record kiye gaye hain.

src: Identify the rural sub-districts that had maternal ANC registrations in 2022 but did not record any in 2021.
mt: 2022 mein maternal ANC registrations wale rural sub-districts dhundho, lekin 2021 mein koi record na ho.

src: List the names of rural sub-districts, in alphabetical order, where more than 5,000 pregnant women have registered for antenatal care.
mt: Rural sub-districts ke naam, alphabetical order mein list karo, jahan 5,000 se zyada pregnant women ne antenatal care ke liye register kiya hai.

src: Identify all rural sub-districts as well as any sub-districts that recorded more than 5,000 antenatal care registrations in a single month.
mt: Sabhi rural sub-districts aur woh sub-districts bhi dhundho jahan ek hi mahine mein 5,000 se zyada antenatal care registrations record kiye gaye hain.

src: For the year 2021, provide a breakdown by area type showing the total number of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 and the average number of hemoglobin tests conducted.
mt: 2021 ke liye, area type ke hisaab se breakdown do, jismein dikhao total number of pregnant women jinka hemoglobin level 11 se kam hai, aur average number of hemoglobin tests jo conduct kiye gaye.

src: For the year 2021, provide a breakdown by area type of the total number of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 and the average number of hemoglobin tests conducted, specifically for areas where the count of low-hemoglobin cases is under 38, sorted by the total cases in descending order.
mt: 2021 ke liye, area type ke hisaab se ek breakdown do, jismein total pregnant women ka count ho jinka hemoglobin level 11 se kam hai, aur average hemoglobin tests conducted ka bhi, specifically un areas ke liye jahan low-hemoglobin cases ki count 38 se kam hai, sorted by total cases descending order mein.

src: Which rural sub-districts reported more than 500 cases of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 during the year 2021?
mt: Konsi rural sub-districts ne saal 2021 mein 11 se kam hemoglobin level wale pregnant women ke 500 se zyada cases report kiye?

src: Which rural sub-districts reported more than 500 pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 in the year 2021?
mt: Kaun se gaon ke ilaake mein 2021 mein 11 se kam hemoglobin wale 500 se zyada pregnant women report kiye gaye?

src: Provide a breakdown of sub-districts and their area types, showing the total count of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 for the first year, focusing only on records where the count is less than 38 and ranking the results from highest to lowest.
mt: Sub-districts aur unke area types ka breakdown do, jismein pehle saal ke liye hemoglobin level 11 se kam wale pregnant women ka total count dikhao, sirf un records par focus karo jahan count 38 se kam hai, aur results ko highest se lowest tak rank karo.

src: Identify the top 5 rural sub-districts with the highest number of pregnant women recorded with hemoglobin levels below 11 in 2021.
mt: Top 5 rural sub-districts batayein jahan 2021 mein hemoglobin level 11 se kam wale pregnant women ki sabse zyada recording hui ho.

src: Identify the sub-districts and their area types where fewer than 38 pregnant women had hemoglobin levels below 11 in September 2020, excluding areas with no recorded cases.
